programme.desc: A deep look at some of the most notorious crimes and mysteries of our time.

programme.desc: Hundreds of people vanished without a trace in the mid 1970s, leaving their families was distraught and wondering about them for decades. In March 1997, shocking news of a mysterious religious group made world headlines.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: The Strange Case of the Killer Nanny

programme.title: Forensic Files: Tight-Fitting Genes
programme.desc: A behavioral profile is helpful in a murder investigation, but it's not an answer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Deadly Valentine
programme.desc: An obstetrician tried unsuccessfully to revive a man's wife who he found covered in blood.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Headquarters
programme.desc: Hunters stumble upon a scene that includes a skull and small bones, bits of clothing, a woman's shoe, and a strand of hair. Police determine a woman was stabbed to death, and reconstruct an image of her face to find her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: One for the Road
programme.desc: After a married couple decided to escape the cold of winter with a vacation in Key West, the wife went missing and police searched the island without finding any evidence. Then two important pieces of video surfaced.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Clean Getaway
programme.desc: An employee of a dry-cleaner was raped and murdered in the store with two eyewitnesses.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Prints Among Thieves
programme.desc: An eccentric millionaire who flaunted his wealth is found murdered.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Seeds for Doubt
programme.desc: A well-respected nurse in a small community dies in a car accident. Investigators suspect drunk driving, until test results come back showing no alcohol was ingested.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Saving Face
programme.desc: A woman disappears without a trace and it appears that she was either kidnapped or murdered. Police concern heightens when they learn that two other women have vanished under similar circumstances.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Walking Terror
programme.desc: A neighbour witnesses a man stab and drown his wife. When the man is questioned by police, he remembers nothing, and is shocked at his own actions. The jury must decide if he is a murderer, or suffering from a sleep disorder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Trial by Fire
programme.desc: A house erupts into flames on a winter night, killing one person and injuring another. The survivor blamed a kerosene heater for the fire, but the evidence did not match her story.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Tagging a Suspect
programme.desc: Bomb attacks typically pose a difficult problem for investigators to solve due to the absence of the attacker and a damaged crime scene, but forensic scientists manage to uncover miniscule pieces of plastic that lead straight to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Strong Impressions
programme.desc: The wife of an Air Force officer is found dead in her bed, and authorities initially believe the cause of death to be accidental suffocation by a laundry bag, but further forensic investigation reveals the horrifying truth.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Nailed
programme.desc: Just before she's scheduled to testify against her alleged rapist, a woman is murdered on her front lawn. 15 years later, investigators used new technology to finally catch the woman's killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sign of the Zodiac
programme.desc: A serial killer that admires the infamous Zodiac Killer prowls New York City's streets for six years, trying to kill one person for every zodiac sign. Police use a variety of forensic tools to arrest the culprit.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Leg Up on Crime
programme.desc: The case of a decomposed body found in an irrigation canal goes unsolved until shoe prints left by the careless criminal while dumping the body of his second victim give authorities the evidence they need.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Tight-Fitting Genes
programme.desc: A behavioral profile is helpful in a murder investigation, but it's not an answer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bed of Deceit
programme.desc: When a retired police officer is found shot dead in his bed, investigators suspect suicide. But the evidence, alongside surveillance tape from a nearby bank, seems to indicate it was murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Smoke in Your Eyes
programme.desc: The bodies of two young women are found in the ashes of an apartment fire, which appears to have been set deliberately.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Oily in the Morning
programme.desc: Police recover a submerged car, but don't find the missing man they were looking for.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Gold Rush
programme.desc: A man calls 911 saying his girlfriend shot herself, but the autopsy reveals that the gunshot wound was not self-inflicted.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Over and Out
programme.desc: A pipe bomb explodes in a house, killing a man and wounding his mother. Police use a lot number on a battery and a mailing label to track down the bomber, and determine his motive.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Death by a Salesman
programme.desc: Even though there were no witnesses, police manage to track down murderer less than 12 hours after the fact. Using fingerprints at the scene and security camera footage, officers arrested the perpetrator even though he was out of the state, on a bus.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hunter or Hunted?
programme.desc: A women is killed in the woods on the last day of hunting season, and police assume it was an accident until a suspicious letter arrives.

programme.title: Forensic Files: In Harm's Way
programme.desc: A woman's butchered body is found, and the medical examiner preserves her rib cage bearing a mortal wound and containing the identifying microscopic marks of the blade used; miles away, a knife is found that will be compared to her bone markings.

programme.title: HLN Weekend Express
programme.desc: News of the day mixed with lifestyle segments, plus weather, sports and enlightening guests.

programme.title: HLN Weekend Express

programme.title: HLN Weekend Express

programme.title: Real Life Nightmare: You'll Never Find Him
programme.desc: 6-year-old Timmothy Pitzen vanishes after a three-day trip to waterparks and the zoo with his mom. In a terrifying twist, his mom is found dead in a motel room with a disturbing note by her side.

programme.title: Real Life Nightmare: Vanished From the Crib
programme.desc: Baby Lisa Irwin goes missing from her crib in the middle of the night. Stolen cell phones and a disturbing debit card charge on the parent’s account only adds to the mystery.

programme.title: Real Life Nightmare: Million Dollar Death
programme.desc: Rebecca Zahau seemed to have it all, until she’s found dead in a multi-million dollar mansion, hanging from a balcony under bizarre circumstances. Police ruled her death a suicide, but some aren’t buying it.

programme.title: Real Life Nightmare: 5-Year Old Vanished
programme.desc: Five-year-old Haleigh Cummings disappears from her home after her dad’s girlfriend puts her to bed.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Bologna Maker
programme.desc: Mike heads to Pennsylvania and tries his hand at making bologna and then goes to Alaska to repair a very special toilet.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Termite Researcher
programme.desc: Mike visits with long-time fans Marilyn and Carolyn Maedel to look at never-before-seen footage at a crawfish factory in Louisiana. Then, he experiences the many hands-on duties that come with being a termite researcher on Sapolo Island in Georgia.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Reef Ball Maker
programme.desc: Mike rolls up his sleeves and gets dirty in order to help create an artificial underwater reef. It's a dirty job that is helping to revitalize fish and coral populations in areas that have been devastated by pollution.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Sea Lamprey Exterminator
programme.desc: In Michigan, Mike helps the U.S. Department of Fish & Wildlife control the sea lamprey population that is jeopardizing the fishing industry of the Great Lakes. Then at Mandalay Bay Casino Mike makes 'meat gel' to feed the fish in the shark reef aquarium.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Date Palm Pollenator
programme.desc: Mike travels to Palm Springs where he collects pollen from male date palm pods and pollinates female trees. He also shows never before seen footage and answers viewer mail.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Bone Black
programme.desc: Mike heads to Michigan where he gets dirty in the Bone Black plant. He then meets with twin sisters who are huge fans of the show.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Animal Rendering
programme.desc: Mike heads to Southern California to find out what it takes to keep a tar pit clean. Then Mike travels north where he learns about rendering and discovers how much of a farm animal can be recycled.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Blueberry Connoisseur
programme.desc: Mike creates an 'interesting' flavour at the Jelly Belly Candy Company.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Fuel Tank Cleaner
programme.desc: Mike Rowe travels to the McConnell Air Force Base in Wichita, Kansas to join forces and clean the Stratotanker fuel tanks. Mike learns what it takes to keep the KC-135 Stratotanker in mid-air as the job gets messy, gooey and downright dirty.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Geoduck Farmer
programme.desc: Mike is waist deep in mud as he harvest clams in the cold waters of Puget Sound. In an attempt to preserve to environment, Mike gets dirty in California's Santa Monica Mountains before helping to restore Philadelphia's church's antique pipe organ.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Skull Cleaner
programme.desc: Mike Rowe helps keeps trains on track before linking Sausages, a southern delicacy that's no treat to make. Before animal skulls and bones are put on display, they have to be cleaned by Mike.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Hot Tar Roofer
programme.desc: Mike gets filthy dirty as he tackles the profession of hot tar roofing a church rooftop.

programme.title: Secret America
programme.desc: They are the most iconic symbols of America, but lurking behind each one are conspiracy theories, myths, and lies.

programme.title: Secret America
programme.desc: They are the most iconic symbols of America: but lurking behind each one are conspiracy theories, myths, and lies.

programme.title: Seasons on the Fly: Wild Alaska Cruises - Mark Few
programme.desc: We go fishing in Alaska with basketball coach Mark Few.

programme.title: Tomorrow's World Today: From the Ground Up
programme.desc: A look at advances in renewable resources.

programme.title: The Elite Fishing League: Winning Ways Feature from Round 5
programme.desc: A look back at the previous rounds.

programme.title: The Anglerschannel Bass Wrap Up Show: December
programme.desc: We do some Carolina Riggin' on Lake Guntersville, and continue our talk with Pro Charging systems. We also look back at the year's events.

programme.title: Ocean Legacy: Best of Ocean Legacy
programme.desc: A look at season one's highlights.

programme.title: Out Da Bayou: Best of the Bayou
programme.desc: A look at highlights from the past year.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Lost Gold of Paradise Hill
programme.desc: Tony fires up a second plant to haul in gold left behind by the old-timers. Tensions rise when Parker departs for Alaska, leaving Mitch in charge. Rick faces disaster when he his sluice box springs a leak.

programme.title: Gold Rush: White Water: Fistful of Nuggets
programme.desc: Dustin's gamble of investing his life savings into these claims pays off after Carlos removes a monster boulder and finds chunky nuggets. Fred and crew battle the Trifecta, and a game-changing discovery proves Fred's theory of the ancient waterfall.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Montana Mountain Modern
programme.desc: A father-son duo builds an off-grid home in Montana's Flathead Valley. The 720-square-foot stick-frame home takes advantage of the mountain winds using a wind-turbine generator for power and features plenty of upcycled materials from the surrounding area.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: California Cob House
programme.desc: A group of off-grid-living enthusiasts come together to build a 300-square-foot bungalow. With a variety of eco-friendly features, including a solar-powered water pump, this house is a welcome addition to the environmentally friendly community.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Hudson Valley Retreat
programme.desc: Peter and Ashley Jensen build a sustainable straw bale panel house in the Hudson Valley, the first of its kind in the States. With only three months to work, the race against nature is as they attempt to finish before the East Coast winter sets in.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Vermont Stone House
programme.desc: Novice builder Danny Clark attempts to construct a 600-square-foot stone cabin in Vermont's White River Valley. The home is sure to be a true work of art but his inexperience, the harsh winter and the unusual architecture push him to his limits.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Cascade Mountain Escape
programme.desc: A couple builds their 2400-square-foot dream cabin in the Cascade Mountains of Washington State.

programme.title: Welcome to Plathville: Friend or Boyfriend?
programme.desc: Moriah decides that it's time to keep her promise to Max, and she introduces him to her family. Ethan and Olivia continue to mend their marriage, but Olivia is crushed when she hears some disappointing news.

programme.title: I Love a Mama's Boy: My Best Girls
programme.desc: One mother helps her son buy lingerie to spice up his sex life, while another crashes her son's Valentine's Day date.

programme.title: I Love a Mama's Boy: You're Not Invited
programme.desc: Matt wants to spend Valentine's Day with his mom, while Shekeb disinvites his mom to date night. Justina's first steps toward wedding planning are overtaken by her future mother-in-law, Annette.

programme.title: I Love a Mama's Boy: Don't Leave Me This Way
programme.desc: Emily reacts to Shekeb ditching her to tend to his mother. Stephanie finds herself struggling to win Liz's acceptance. Jason shares bad news with his mom.

programme.title: I Love a Mama's Boy: Mother-Son Tango
programme.desc: Jason's mom has an odd request for their wedding dance. Mike defends Stephanie to his mother. Kelly intrudes on a romantic dinner between Matt and Kim, and Emily finds herself in the hot seat at Laila's birthday party.

programme.title: I Love a Mama's Boy: Who's That Girl?
programme.desc: Laila ambushes Shekeb and Emily with an unwelcome surprise. At Justina's request, Jason asks his mother to butt out of wedding planning. A visit with the architect proves Matt's mom has shocking plans for their new house.

programme.title: I Love a Mama's Boy: Mommy's Choice
programme.desc: Steph makes an attempt to bond with Liz. Justina and her sisters fight off Annette's wedding dress demands. Emily gives Shekeb an ultimatum after being humiliated by Laila again.

programme.title: I Love a Mama's Boy: Tell What?
programme.desc: Kim finds herself losing patience with Matt and Kelly. Justina finally confronts Annette. Laila learns Shekeb wants to move out of her house.

programme.title: OutDaughtered: It's Beginning to Look a Lot like Quintmas
programme.desc: After getting bad news about Hazel, Danielle's determined to make this the best Christmas ever. But Adam has different plans for the holiday, which may sour the celebration. The quints perform in the Christmas show, but stage fright may take center stage.

programme.title: OutDaughtered: I'm Dreaming of a Cajun Christmas
programme.desc: Danielle and Adam are determined to give their daughters the best Christmas ever. But as their plans start to crumble, so does Danielle.

programme.title: Four Houses: Home for the Holidays
programme.desc: Florist David puts his California ranch up against math coach Marcy's bay front home, software company CEO Andrew's Spanish colonial and stay-at-home mom Tanja's Tuscan villa.

programme.title: Four Houses: Deck the Halls
programme.desc: In New York, Marie puts her refined holiday decorations up against Kevin's Christmas light spectacular.

programme.title: My Crazy Obsession: Christmas Collection 2
programme.desc: Follow four Christmas fanatics as they reveal the amount of time, money and effort they put into their obsessions all year-round.

programme.title: Extreme Christmas Trees
programme.desc: Captures the anticipation, excitement and sheer joy embodied by the ultimate Christmas icon: The Christmas Tree.

programme.title: Invasion of the Christmas Lights
programme.desc: This holiday special criss-crosses the U.S. to chronicle families of extreme Christmas lighting enthusiasts, and documenting their glorious, outrageous and elaborate displays.

programme.title: Invasion of the Christmas Lights 2
programme.desc: We criss-cross the U.S. and visit six homes where wizards of light out-do the neighbours and put on holiday displays that dazzle.

programme.title: Holiday ER
programme.desc: When a man dressed as Santa is near death, his wife asks his doctor for a special favour. A man has a live fish stuck in his throat, an elf is in distress and a boy has a blue leg that defies diagnosis.

programme.title: Santa Sent Me to the ER
programme.desc: It's 'Ho, Ho, Oh No!' as we unwrap the hilarious details of what really happens when Christmas cheer leads to 'Oh Dear.' Real people confess how their holiday dreams turned into yuletide nightmares full of bumps, bruises and broken Christmas spirits.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Nursing Intuition

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Night of the Full Moon
programme.desc: Spooky cases leave doctors proclaiming, 'It must be a full moon.'

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Seasonings Greetings
programme.desc: The stakes are high during the holidays for four chefs as they attempt to make their best holiday starter using only every other aisle of the store.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Delivery: All-Star Holiday
programme.desc: Guy and Hunter Fieri recruit three all-star chefs to play holiday games in their home kitchens. The Fieris send groceries and an oversized stocking filled with holiday sweets that the chefs must incorporate into two different seasonal dishes.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Takeout: Culinary All-Stars
programme.desc: Guy's family loves cooking at home and great restaurant food, so they're combining the best of both worlds by firing up takeout with a twist. On the menu, there's tandoor chicken poutine and polenta flavour bomb, arancini and empandas.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Pork Hall of Fame
programme.desc: Guy is hitting up all things pork. From Connecticut to California, and international favorites to American classics, Guy is digging into pork in more way than you can count.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Family Meals
programme.desc: Guy Fieri is embracing family-run spots on this trip. In Ottawa, Canada, two brothers-in-law carryin' on a decades-long seafood tradition. In Richmond, Va., a mother-son duo running a breakfast, lunch and dinner joint in honor of their Pop.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Burger and Breakfast
programme.desc: On this trip, Guy Fieri's going from breakfast to burgers. In Vancouver, British Columbia, a pie shop bakin' up both sweet and savory sensations. In Chico, California, a morning hot spot pumping up French toast and spicing up potatoes.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Porkapalooza
programme.desc: Guy goes coast to coast to try pulled pork and andouille sausage.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Layers of Flavor
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's firin' up the grill and stacking up the flavour. In Toronto, Canada, the restored diner cooking up pork belly, a mac and cheese burger and a Christmas burger.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: Italian, Thai and Pie
programme.desc: Guy Fieri has a righteous time revisiting joints offering everything from pie to Thai. In Honolulu, a family spot going strong with their specialties straight out of Thailand.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Savory Sensations
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's warming up with some standout specialties. In Brooklyn, N.Y., the mom and pop diner flipping a skillet apple waffle with pancetta and deep-frying breakfast empanadas.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: Guy's Going Home
programme.desc: On this trip, Guy Fieri's hittin' up some of his favourite hometown haunts. First, he pops into a Mexican joint right in his Santa Rosa, Calif., 'hood, where he chows on the pozole every time he's off the road.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: From Pork to Pot Pie
programme.desc: Guy Fieri starts things off internationally as he brings the whole family to his favourite jerk joint in Ocho Rios, Jamaica. Then it's back to the States, where a cafeteria in Tucker, Ga. hasn't changed a thing - including its true Southern staples.

programme.title: Giada's Holiday Handbook: Winter Wonderland Party

programme.title: Baked in Vermont: Vermont Tree Juice
programme.desc: Late spring in Vermont can only mean one thing - maple syrup. Gesine Prado is baking up a big brunch with what remains of last season's maple syrup harvest while her husband, Ray, is in the yard tapping the trees for this year's crop.

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa: Back to Basics: Cooking for Jeffrey: Weekend Guest
programme.desc: Ina makes spicy hermit bars and tomato carpaccio for her friend's visit.

programme.title: Valerie's Home Cooking: I'm Dreaming of a White ... Elephant?
programme.desc: Valerie Bertinelli invites her pals Melissa Peterman and Nicole Sullivan over for a white elephant gift exchange because one person's disaster is another person's delight.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Home Sweet Home: New Holiday Faves
programme.desc: Ree Drummond gets in the holiday spirit with apple, brie and mushrooms en croute, traditional eggnog in a ginger crumb-rimmed glass and an ugly sweater cake. She also makes berry basil vodka and festive marinated olives for a happy hour gift basket.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Ask Me Anything: Holidays
programme.desc: Ree Drummond is tackling holiday questions, and the answers include outrageously cheesy lasagna dip and chips and a big festive salad perfect to take to any potluck bash. She covers make-ahead dessert questions with festive cinnamon apples.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Cowboy Cookie Swap
programme.desc: Ree Drummond gets ready for a cookie swap where there's no actual swapping, just four awesome cowboys swinging by to fill up their cookie plates with festive treats! There will be cinnamon roll cookies, red velvet crinkle cookies, and more.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Never Enough Puff
programme.desc: Ree shares her top five favorite things to do with puffed pastry, her secret weapon for entertaining made easy! First, cheese straws and sausage parmesan palmiers are a duo of divine quick and easy canapes.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm: Holiday Spirit
programme.desc: Molly Yeh celebrates her favourite time of the year by making a festive buffet for three generations of the family. There are pastrami meatballs, brussels sprouts latkes, rolled potato flatbreads and her speculoos-inspired airline cookie sheet cakes.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Tree Trimming Party
programme.desc: Trisha Yearwood takes inspiration from holiday traditions and invites friends and family to her home for a tree-trimming party. This celebration of good company and great food includes a menu of toasted gruyere and cranberry cups.

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa: Back to Basics: Best of Barefoot Comfort: Make-Ahead
programme.desc: Ina Garten is serving up her top make-ahead dishes from over the years, including Moroccan lamb tagine and a showstopping chocolate banana cream pie. Plus, crusty baked shells and cauliflower is perfect for weeknights.

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa: Back to Basics: Cook Like a Pro: Celebration Sides
programme.desc: Ina Garten lifts the veil on all her tips, sharing techniques and incredible elegant and easy recipes.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Squab, Squab, Squab, Squab, Squab
programme.desc: Alan leaves Jake at Evelyn's for a disastrous sleepover and winds up partying with Charlie.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Santa's Village of the Damned
programme.desc: Alan falls for his cooking class teacher, who quickly moves into the house, fattens the guys up with gourmet meals, drives Berta crazy with housekeeping tips and generally turns all of their lives upside down.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Sleep Tight, Puddin' Pop
programme.desc: Charlie puts himself in a compromising position when he spends a drunken evening with his stalker, Rose. Later, he comes face-to-face with her father, who demands to know what Charlie's intentions are with his daughter.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Apologies for the Frivolity
programme.desc: Though Charlie despises his sharp-tongued, passive aggressive mother, he's strangely attracted to Lydia, an attractive, blonde high-end real estate agent, just like his mother. Unfortunately, the similarities don't end there.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Release the Dogs
programme.desc: Unable to sleep, Alan takes one of Charlie's suggestions and goes for a jog on the beach. When his jog takes a disastrous turn, he then turns to a psychiatrist in the hopes that discovering the source of his insomnia will help alleviate it.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Walnuts and Demerol
programme.desc: As Charlie prepares for a steamy Christmas Eve with his date, friends and family keep dropping in and staying. When Evelyn discovers who Charlie's date is, she inexplicably becomes desperate to break them up before they go too far.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Smooth as a Ken Doll
programme.desc: As Judith and Herb's wedding nears, Charlie gets a bit too close to Herb's witty sister.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Aunt Myra Doesn't Pee a Lot
programme.desc: Alan prepares Jake for Judith's wedding, while Charlie continues his fling with Herb's sister Myra.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Is There a Mrs. Waffles?

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: The Mooch at the Boo

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: The Devil's Lube

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: The Passion of the Christine

programme.desc: A dog called Mac is rushed in after being hit by a car. Dr. Amy performs surgery on a canine called Rebel who was impaled with a stick, while Dr. Baier helps Kino, a hound in heat even though she's been spayed twice.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Sneak Peek
programme.desc: Tia Maria Torres works to save pit bulls from dangerous and abusive situations.

programme.desc: Dr. Jeff celebrates 30 years in business and answers questions from fans. He and Hector reflect on memorable events such as a dog that comes in after being bitten by a rattlesnake with no remedy handy, and a hungry hound mistakes a giant rock as lunch.

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo: Bear-y Christmas!
programme.desc: Christmas comes early with the birth of Kyra, the UK's first ever surviving sun bear cub, but the rare new bear proves a little over-adventurous and gets stuck up a tree on its first outing outside.

programme.desc: A dog called Mac is rushed in after being hit by a car. Dr. Amy performs surgery on a canine called Rebel who was impaled with a stick, while Dr. Baier helps Kino, a hound in heat even though she's been spayed twice.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Left for Dead
programme.desc: Tia races to rescue an emaciated puppy chained to an abandoned home. A couple visits VRC in hope of finding a younger sibling for their dog. And a Good Samaritan needs help rescuing a stray mama dog still bleeding three weeks after giving birth.

programme.title: Dr. Jeff: Rocky Mountain Vet: 30-Year Ride
programme.desc: Dr. Jeff celebrates 30 years in business and answers questions from fans. He and Hector reflect on memorable events such as a dog that comes in after being bitten by a rattlesnake with no remedy handy, and a hungry hound mistakes a giant rock as lunch.

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo: Bear-y Christmas!

programme.desc: Otter couple Diego and Icana are best friends but have never mated, so keepers decide to replace Diego with a new male Tarubu. They hope that young Tarubu will relight Icana's fire and that they will provide Chester with long awaited otter pups.

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo: The Trials of Parenting
programme.desc: Baby flamingo Marley's mom has lost interest in mothering duties leaving dad, Rum, to rear the baby alone. Parenting duties are normally shared equally by flamingo parents, but Rum will have to do the work of two parents if his son is going to endure.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Above and Beyond
programme.desc: For a game warden, there's no such thing as being off the clock. Wardens McBrine and Carter embark on a multi-day hunt for a wanted man. Warden Herring investigates a mysterious shack on city property. Warden McKenney works to remove a deadly hazard.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Dead Moose Talking
programme.desc: The wardens wage a large-scale investigation into a moose that's been shot and left in the woods. A camouflaged ATV leads Warden Richardson to a convicted felon. Warden MacCabe runs across a hunter unlike any other.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Baiters Beware
programme.desc: Fair chase is the gold standard of hunting, and in Maine, it's the law. Sgt. Simmons and Warden McKenney pursue a pair of brothers with bait piles. Warden Carter hunts for a father who may be teaching his son to poach. Warden Cross snares a trap thief.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Antlers and Antics
programme.desc: Sergeant Spahr and Warden Lounder chase down a fleeing ATV. Warden Pelkey sends his K9 in search of evidence over a suspiciously shot moose. Warden MacCabe wrangles a tangled great blue heron.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Midsummer Mayhem
programme.desc: Officer Holmes and trainee Frye respond to an ATV accident in which a man's head has been run over. Officer McKee helps relocate a rare rattlesnake. Officer Courtney assists a dog locked inside a car. On Mt. Willard, a collapsed student needs rescuing.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Don't Feed the Bears
programme.desc: Officer Joe Canfield investigates a home with multiple bear feeding complaints and finds more than he bargained for. Officer Egan investigates an abandoned car and missing persons case. And Officers respond to a drowning in the Connecticut River.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Schoolyard Bear
programme.desc: Officer Chris McKee attempts to remove a bear from a tree in a playground, while Officer Fluette picks out his new K9 partner. Officer Lucas searches for a group of ATVs. On the snowy summit of Mt. Washington, officers search for lost hikers.

programme.title: North Woods Law: The Fast and the Curious
programme.desc: Newly promoted Sgt. Lucas shows Trainee Frye the ropes during a busy ATV weekend. Hannett attempts to rescue an injured heron and later faces off with a moose. And lost hikers turn to Holmes for help as the sun goes down and temperatures drop.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Good News, Bad News

programme.title: North Woods Law: Circle of Life
programme.desc: Officer Crouse responds to a call about a nuisance raccoon, while Officer Towne searches for a deer attacked by coyotes. Officer Hannett monitors a suspicious fisherman and Officer St. Pierre responds to a call about an impaired driver.

programme.desc: By studying the world of primates in new and intimate detail, this episode offers fresh insight into the development of intelligence and social behaviour.

programme.title: Baby Chimp Rescue: Breaking Point
programme.desc: At the chimpanzee rescue, the team now has twenty-eight chimps to look after, including an eight week-old baby called Gaia. A deadly cold breaks out among the babies, and the team rescues an adult male chimp called Jonny.

programme.title: Life: Challenges of Life
programme.desc: Journey through Earth to discover the extraordinary diversity of animals and plants that exists today and the most extreme stories of survival nature has to offer.

programme.title: Life: Reptiles and Amphibians
programme.desc: Reptiles and amphibians live on every continent except Antarctica. From icy wastelands to arid deserts, they outnumber mammals and birds, and their extraordinary forms and bizarre behaviour are constantly surprising.

programme.title: Life: Mammals
programme.desc: New techniques reveal previously unseen behaviour, both the huge spectacle and the remarkable intimacy of mammal life, in the most extreme locations on Earth.

programme.title: Life: Fish
programme.desc: Witness the secret and ferocious world of the great white and sailfish, the puffer fish and barracuda, in this extraordinary journey from open ocean to coral reef and from storm-ravaged surf zone to the abyssal depths.

programme.title: Baby Chimp Rescue: Breaking Point

programme.title: Life: Birds

programme.title: Life: Insects
programme.desc: Using the latest techniques and remote-controlled 'ant-cams', enter the world of armoured-plated insects, spiders and scorpions.

programme.title: Life: Hunters and Hunted
programme.desc: Explore the world of the carnivores, from cats and dogs to bears and dolphins that must make a kill in order to survive. To win, they must overcome the weapons, intelligence and speed of their prey.

programme.title: Hidden Habitats: Amazon
programme.desc: Steven Backshall investigates what make the Amazon so diverse. He looks at the nutrient poor nature of the rainforest and discusses the strategies used by the life in the jungle to make the most of the little nutrients available.

programme.title: Chimp Sanctuary
programme.desc: Sue Perkins travels to Chimp Haven, the US national chimpanzee sanctuary in Louisiana, to visit six female ex-laboratory chimpanzees starting retirement.

programme.title: Life: Plants
programme.desc: Enter the world of plants as time-lapse technology makes this violent and self-seeking organism's behaviour a truly dynamic and surprisingly emotional experience.

programme.title: Life: Primates

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland: Death Before Marriage
programme.desc: Carol has been waiting 25 years to marry the love of her life, Jack Parkes. Six weeks away from their wedding in Kennedy Township, PA, she finds him shot in the head in their living room. The murder will destroy her life and uncover dark family secrets.

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland: No Giving Up
programme.desc: When Marty finds his big brother Mike Rust's home in disarray with a motorcycle missing, the Saguache, Colorado, community leaves no stone unturned searching for one of their own. The case goes cold as years pass, but the local rumor mill heats up.

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland: The Friends You Keep
programme.desc: Home will never feel safe again after Jill finds her daughter Emma Walker cold to the touch in her own bed. Quickly ruling out suicide, investigators search for a suspicious man in black caught on a neighbor's home surveillance camera.

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland: The Farmer's Daughter
programme.desc: Bubbly college student and waitress, Mindy Morgenstern, is found strangled and stabbed in her own apartment. Family, friends, and the entire town of Valley City, North Dakota help law enforcement identify who could have committed this violent crime.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: The Hustlers

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: Chameleon
programme.desc: '20/20' reports on a murder mystery that unraveled across the country for over three decades, including details about how cutting edge DNA technology and a mysterious five-year-old girl provided crucial clues that helped authorities solve the case.

programme.desc: '20/20' reports on a murder mystery that unraveled across the country for over three decades, including details about how cutting edge DNA technology and a mysterious five-year-old girl provided crucial clues that helped authorities solve the case.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: The Affair
programme.desc: After one partner in a marriage has an affair, the wife says she's moving forward. But with hidden back accounts, DNA testing kits and a gun, the woman is becoming unhinged. A deadly act of revenge leaves just one person to tell the tale.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: Chameleon
programme.desc: '20/20' reports on a murder mystery that unraveled across the country for over three decades, including details about how cutting edge DNA technology and a mysterious five-year-old girl provided crucial clues that helped authorities solve the case.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: Can Words Kill?

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: NXIVM
programme.desc: The leader of NXIM is accused of operating a secret sorority that treated women a slaves and branded them for life.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Unspeakable Acts
programme.desc: Greed and lust drove these deadly women to unspeakable acts.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Lover's Revenge
programme.desc: Find out what made these women so angry that they turned on the ones they loved.

programme.title: The Devil Speaks: Lake of Lies
programme.desc: Investigators must cast a wide net for clues when the family of Breckenridge resident Sharon Garrison report her missing. There's evidence to suggest she's skipped town, but a set of secret cassette tapes soon point to something far more sinister.

programme.title: The Devil Speaks: Dirty Little Secret
programme.desc: Close friends are investigated after the death of an 83-year-old grandfather who was having an affair with a woman half his age.

programme.title: The Devil Speaks: Killer Reputation
programme.desc: Dr. Margo Prade is shot to death in the parking lot of her own medical practice in Akron, Ohio, and the senseless act shocks the city. Police are baffled. Until they discover that Margo's phone calls were being secretly recorded.

programme.title: The Devil Speaks: Evil in South Texas
programme.desc: Billy Staton and his fiancé Leticia Castro vanish without a trace. Have they left town and eloped? The discovery of Billy's burnt out car and a shock confession, reveal a web of lies that only a secret recording can untangle the truth.

programme.title: Diabolical: Weeping Widow
programme.desc: After losing her husband in a tragic accident, God-fearing Cindy McKay claims she's had to bend the law to pay off his illicit debts. But authorities soon realize she's a criminal mastermind.

programme.title: Diabolical: Recording Evil
programme.desc: Gina Coccia comes home from work to discover the bodies of her girlfriend Lynn, and Lynn's nephew, Ronnie, shot and stabbed on the kitchen floor. The investigation that follows will lead police, to a months long plot and a terrifying act of betrayal.

programme.title: Diabolical: Murder Is No Accident
programme.desc: After Cynthia Roth drowns in the middle of a crowded lake, investigators will uncover a decades long trail of terror. To catch this killer before they can claim their next victim, detectives will have to take extraordinary measures.

programme.title: Diabolical: Caught in the Cover-Up
programme.desc: In West Bloomfield, Michigan, a simple affair between two coworkers turns complex as the two lovers are willing to do anything...even commit murder... to protect their darkest secret.

programme.title: Diabolical: Control Freak
programme.desc: Donna Scrivo adult son Ramsay in days, and she's worried. She alerts the local police, but days pass with no sign of him anywhere. Then a grisly discovery of a severed human head and body parts along a rural highway reveals a act of shocking violence.

programme.title: See No Evil: Goodnight Jessika
programme.desc: On September 7th, 2009, 27-year-old Jessika Kalaher is found strangled in her car in Cedar Park, Texas. With her wallet and car keys missing, detectives turn to security cameras to answer who and why.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Stalin
programme.desc: After blocking the Germans right outside of Moscow, Stalin now faces Hitler's second assault. The world's fate will be decided in Stalingrad. Like in Leningrad, men, women, and children are plunged into hell and sacrificed.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Stalin
programme.desc: The Soviets continue on the path to towards liberation. On the road to Berlin, they discover the horror of Hitler's extermination camps. Fifteen years earlier, Stalin transformed his country using every means at his disposal.

programme.desc: Following a string of victories in Virginia, General Robert E. Lee brings his Army north in a bold attempt to end the Civil War and win Southern Independence.

programme.title: Blood and Fury: America's Civil War: Battle of Fredericksburg
programme.desc: Following the strategic Union win at Antietam, Federal forces clash with a massive rebel army in the town of Fredericksburg, Virginia in what will become the largest fight of the Civil War.

programme.title: Blood and Fury: America's Civil War: Battle of Gettysburg
programme.desc: An elite band of Yankee Sharpshooters must stop Robert E. Lee's Alabamian shock troops from flanking the Union line and winning the battle of Gettysburg and perhaps the entire Civil War.

programme.title: Blood and Fury: America's Civil War: Battle of Nashville
programme.desc: In a daring attempt to regain the upper hand in the Civil War, Confederate forces try to retake the city of Nashville and sever the supply line that's feeding the Union invasion of the south.

programme.title: Blood and Fury: America's Civil War: Battle of Petersburg
programme.desc: The Union invasion of the south has ground to a halt at the seemingly impregnable ring of trenches built around Petersburg, Virginia. After eight bloody attempts to storm them have failed, two officers from Vermont will lead a daring raid.

programme.title: Hitler's Zombie Army
programme.desc: Truth is revealed of the Allied 'monument men' discovery in 1945 of rotting corpses of Germanic heroes. A world of magic, high priests and secret castles is exposed.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: Retreat from Reality
programme.desc: Adolf Hitler is determined to fight to the very end, even if it costs millions of Germans their lives. He puts his faith in his the 'Wunderwaffe' and the 'wonder weapons,' including the first ever ballistic missile, the V2.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: A Culture of Control
programme.desc: Hitler is determined to change the way German people think and feel by creating a new, Nazi form of art and culture. He takes over the film industry and radio stations, giving the Nazis complete control over every image and message his people receive.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: Himmler's Empire of Terror
programme.desc: Hitler's bid for power depends on his most loyal, and violent supporters: the SS. Using surveillance, detention, and even murder, they defeat political enemies and are most responsible for putting Hitler's deadly policy of racial purity into practice.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Stable Family Ties
programme.desc: Chase and the crew have their work cut out for them turning a vacation cabin that was originally a 1920s horse barn into a stable building for a large family. The crew draw on the past as inspiration and want to honour the owners' late parents.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: The Honeymoon Suite
programme.desc: In a Maine Cabin Masters first, Chase and his creative crew help a newlywed couple take a questionable 'wedding gift' and turn it into an alpine ski bungalow that would rival those found in the Swiss Alps.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Bunganuc Creek Landmark
programme.desc: The team take on an historic clammers' shack with a renovation that includes opening up boarded windows as well as clearing out animal droppings and years or trash and old machinery. Everyone in town watches as they work on the historic landmark.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: The Dixie Dog Den
programme.desc: The Cabin Masters team helps their own Matthew Dix restore his grandfather's old shed to its former glory.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Ship-shape Shack
programme.desc: Chase and the team have their hands full transforming a family's treasured 1950s lobster shack into a cabin that will create a lifetime of memories for generations to come.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Past, Present and Future
programme.desc: A couple's Belle Island camp has a long multi-generational history within their family spanning nearly 100 years. Their camp is an ongoing focus of family life and they are now ready to make its preservation their main priority.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Call of The Loon
programme.desc: Sitting on the shores of Moosehead Lake, the cabin known as the 'Call of The Loon' has been reacquired by the original builder's great-granddaughter. Chase and the team update the amenities and add a second story to accommodate the large family.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: The Shaw Camp Re-Imagination
programme.desc: Following a two-year search, Greg and Denise uncovered their 'diamond in the rough' when they purchased a cabin that was untouched for years on the beautiful shore of Messalonskee Lake in Sidney.

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Big Reno With Astounding Views on Apple Valley Lake in Ohio
programme.desc: A couple customizes an Ohio lakefront home for their large family.

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Lakeside Lounging on Lake Gaston
programme.desc: Amber and Jon are looking for a getaway near their home in Raleigh, NC, and Lake Gaston fits the bill. With assistance from their broker, they find a house with a price that's as perfect as the location but the condition of the home is less than ideal.

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Getting Down in Deep Creek, Maryland
programme.desc: A family of six looks for a vacation home on Deep Creek Lake in Maryland. They find the lakefront property of their dreams but it's in need of some major renovations.

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Making Memories on Lake Martin
programme.desc: A blended family of eight finds a vacation home on Lake Martin, Alabama, but the property needs major renovations. He's a contractor and is ready to get to work with a tight budget and a long to-do list to help the family realize their lakeside dreams.

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Alabama Build
programme.desc: A family looks for a vacation home on Logan Martin Lake, Alabama, in hopes of getaways filled with fishing, kayaking and relaxation. They find a fixer-upper with water views, but the extensive renovations may break the budget.

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Lone Star State Update
programme.desc: After spending years living all over the world, Teresa and Jeremy find the perfect vacation home for their family in their home state of Texas. They're ready to put down roots, but their new lakefront home is in need of some TLC.

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Big-Time Brother Rebuild in Rhode Island
programme.desc: Business partner brothers look for a vacation home in Coventry, RI. Their real estate agent finds the perfect lakefront fixer-upper, but the to-do list is long and the brothers quickly run into many structural issues.

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: A Family Renovation
programme.desc: Two brothers and their wives look for the perfect vacation home in Door County, Wisconsin, for their extended family. They find a charmer with plenty of space for up to 30 people, but their DIY reno reveals unexpected issues.

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Wolf Lake Escape
programme.desc: New parents look to escape their busy New York City lives with a move to Wolf Lake, a small, rustic lake community in upstate New York. The properties they consider require significant renovations and may break the bank.

programme.title: Food Paradise: Hamburger Paradise 3
programme.desc: America's best burgers from Seattle to Philadelphia are tasted.

programme.title: Food Paradise: Hot and Spicy Paradise 2
programme.desc: Spice up your life with the hottest foods in America. Featuring flaming habanero wings in Seattle, an inferno burrito drenched in ghost peppers in San Francisco and spicy chicken in Nashville that will make you cry for your mama.

programme.title: Unique Sweets: Austin Sweet Freeze
programme.desc: Austin can get sweltering hot but they have plenty of delicious options to keep you cool. At Cow Tipping Creamery, Corey Sorensen is making stackers, her layered version of a sundae.

programme.title: Unique Sweets: Sweet Mornings in Sunny L.A.
programme.desc: Visit some Los Angeles hotspots that are the sweetest places to start the day.

programme.title: Unique Sweets: Toronto Sweets
programme.desc: We head north of the border to Toronto.

programme.title: Unique Sweets: Cool Cookie Sandwiches
programme.desc: There's nothing better than the perfect cookie unless you take two of them and put some filling in between.

programme.title: Unique Sweets: Old Is New Again
programme.desc: Classic desserts get deliciously updated at three sweet shops across the country. Skull and Cakebones rocks vegan cupcakes in Austin, Texas, with flavors like basil berry, dirty chai and just beet it.

programme.title: Unique Sweets: Cute and Sweet
programme.desc: Today we visit three locations that pack big flavors in small servings. First stop is Cake Monkey Bakery in Los Angeles to try some of their mini layer cakes.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Southern Eats
programme.desc: It's time for some good, old-fashioned country cooking as Guy Fieri, Alton Brown, Sunny Anderson and Duff Goldman round up their favorite Southern eats.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Stacked
programme.desc: With layers upon layers stacked with flavour and ingredients, these favorite dishes seem too good to be true. Wolfgang Puck gushes about an unimaginable seafood platter at Cassia in Los Angeles.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Stretchy Pants Required
programme.desc: America's best dishes just might burst your buttons. Anne Burrell faces off against a gut-busting club sandwich from Little Goat Diner in Chicago while Antonia Lofaso ventures to the heart of Los Angeles for heavy-hitting Korean barbecue at Park's BBQ.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: More Than I Can Count!
programme.desc: Some special dishes are so good you can enjoy them over and over again. Andrew Zimmern has lost count of how many times he's indulged in the infamous barbecue chicken from Miss Myra's Pit Bar-B-Que in Birmingham, Ala.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Fried and Gone to Heaven
programme.desc: Some fried food is so crispy, so crunchy and so incredible that you feel like you've died and gone to heaven. Jeff Mauro heads to Proxi in Chicago for a food frenzy with the most-unique version of street corn ever imagined. Simon Majumdar takes his taste.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods America: Chicago's Cutting Edge
programme.desc: Andrew explores the driving forces behind the cutting edge food scene in Chicago. From exotic ingredients to innovative techniques, food suppliers in the Windy City are pushing the limits.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods America: Baltimore and Chesapeake Bay
programme.desc: There's a long line of tradition on the menu when Andrew visits Baltimore and the Chesapeake Bay.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Goa
programme.desc: Andrew explores the local cuisine of Goa, a former Portuguese colony in western India.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: New Jersey
programme.desc: Andrew checks out the inventive and international eats of New Jersey. He tries all-you-can-eat Brazilian meat, rich seafood stew, potato-loaded hot dogs and Dominican marinated pork.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Kyoto
programme.desc: Andrew explores the elaborate feasts, home-cooked comfort food, sushi and confections of Kyoto, Japan. From the artistic multi-course dining experience to the everyday humble comfort foods.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Kansas City
programme.desc: Andrew visits Kansas City, where he discovers a swirled Croatian dessert bread and a locally-made marshmallow chocolate candy.

programme.title: The Loud House: Patching Things Up/ Cheater by the Dozen
programme.desc: Lola and Lana try out for Bluebell Scouts but discover one of them might be more suited for it. When Lincoln and Clyde think Bobby is cheating on Lori they follow him around town gathering evidence.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Patchy the Pirate Presents the SpongeBob SquarePants Christmas Special
programme.desc: When Sandy tells the residents of Bikini Bottom about Christmas, SpongeBob wants to bring the holiday to the town. His enthusiasm is infectious, but everyone blames SpongeBob when Santa is a no show on Christmas morning.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Patrick's Staycation/ Walking the Plankton
programme.desc: Patrick wants to take a vacation, but can't afford one, so SpongeBob comes up with a solution: a staycation.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Extreme Sports/ Squirrel Record
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick try to join the extreme sports team the Drasticals. Also, Sandy finds a book of world's records and tries to break them all with SpongeBob's help.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Dear Vikings/ Ditchin'
programme.desc: When Krusty Krab starts a new promotion in honour of the Vikings, SpongeBob sets out to learn all he can about this civilization.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Frozen Face Off
programme.desc: Everyone in Bikini Bottom is participating in a worm-sled race to the South Pole.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Earworm
programme.desc: A song gets stuck in SpongeBob's head and won't go away.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Don't Look Now/ Séance Schméance
programme.desc: SpongeBob holds a séance at the Krusty Krab to learn the recipe for a long-lost sandwich. Then, SpongeBob and Patrick go to see the latest horror film, only to be seemingly stalked by the villain.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Snowball Effect/ One Krab's Trash
programme.desc: Pat and SpongeBob play in the snow; Mr. Krabs sells trash as antiques.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Chum Bucket Supreme/ Single Cell Anniversary
programme.desc: Plankton hires Patrick to create advertising slogans for the Chum Bucket. SpongeBob helps Plankton find the perfect anniversary gift for Karen.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Legends of Bikini Bottom: The Monster Who Came to Bikini Bottom /Welcome to Bikini Bottom Triangle
programme.desc: A monster terrorizes Bikini Bottom until Patrick befriends the huge creature. Then, SpongeBob and all the Bikini Bottom citizens disappear to an underwater resort.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Pest of the West
programme.desc: SpongeBob discovers that he was related to the great Western hero, SpongeBuck.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Ghoul Fools
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick get caught in the feud between a crew of ghost pirates and the Flying Dutchman.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
programme.desc: Leonardo, Donatello, Raphael, Michelangelo, and Splinter work to keep the city safe.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Beyond the Known Universe
programme.desc: The Team meets a strange alien robot called the Fugitoid.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: The Moons of Thalos 3
programme.desc: When the Team crash lands on an ice moon along with the enemy, they must put their differences aside to survive.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: The Weird World of Wyrm
programme.desc: When Casey discovers a hypercube, he unleashes a 4th dimensional being: Wyrm.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: The Outlaw Armaggon
programme.desc: When Lord Dregg hires a bounty hunter to destroy the Turtles, the team flees to an abandoned space station.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Riddle of the Ancient Aeons
programme.desc: The Turtles find themselves on a planet of pure evil.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Journey to the Center of Mikey's Mind
programme.desc: When microscopic aliens invade Mikey's mind, the Turtles have to chase them through the strange world of Mikey's subconscious.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: The Arena of Carnage
programme.desc: The Turtles are captured and thrown into the Triceraton Arena!

programme.title: Danger Force: Santa
programme.desc: Captain Man and Schwoz have a new group of four young superheroes to train.

programme.title: Unleashed: Watch Like A Hawk!
programme.desc: Impressive animal acts compete for the title of 'Most Entertaining Pet.'

programme.title: The Substitute
programme.desc: Celebrities are transformed to go undercover as substitute teachers to surprise a class.

programme.title: Top Elf
programme.desc: 'Elf-testants' compete in holiday-themed challenges to have their wish lists granted.

programme.title: Henry Danger: Henry and the Bad Girl
programme.desc: A gang of artists is spray-painting graffiti all over Swellview. While confronting them, Kid Danger is tempted by a cute girl in the gang, forcing him to choose between her and Captain Man.

programme.title: Henry Danger: Captain Man: On Vacation
programme.desc: Ray has trusted Henry and Charlotte with protecting Swellview while he's out of town at his cousin's wedding. Problems arise when they find themselves having to handle things on their own.

programme.title: Henry Danger: The Time Jerker
programme.desc: When Kid Danger and Captain Man battle the Time Jerker, Kid Danger accidentally falls into the Time Jerker's time machine and relives the same day over again.

programme.title: Henry Danger: Secret Beef
programme.desc: With an invitation to Swellview's most exclusive restaurant, Henry decides to bring his boss, Ray, but finds it more complicated than expected.

programme.title: Henry Danger: Henry's Jelly
programme.desc: After Jasper is lauded for being a local hero, Henry becomes jealous that Kid Danger is the one getting thanks while Henry himself gets nothing.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Candace Disconnected/ Magic Carpet Ride
programme.desc: Candace has no choice but to go to her brothers for help after she loses her phone for the fifth time. Then, inspired by Dad's favourite childhood program, the boys decide to create a magic carpet.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: A Phineas and Ferb Family Christmas/ S'Winter
programme.desc: The boys decide to put on a traditional family Christmas special featuring their family, friends and guests. Featuring new holiday songs including: Buford and Baljeet sing 'Good King Wenceslas' and the whole gang sings 'We Wish You a Merry Christmas.'

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Knot My Problem/ Mind Share
programme.desc: Phineas and the gang switch bodies with alien tourists for a free intergalactic vacation, only to realize they were actually duped and are now stranded on the alien planet.

programme.title: Amphibia: Cursed!/ Fiddle Me This
programme.desc: After Anne helps Sprig break up with Maddie, strange things start happening to them. When a popular talent competition comes to Wartwood, Hop Pop goes overboard in training Sprig to win.

programme.title: Amphibia: Lost in Newtopia/ Sprig Gets Schooled
programme.desc: Anne and Polly vow to experience the city like locals but end up on a wild ride through the streets of Newtopia. Sprig is offered a spot at Newtopia University.

programme.title: The Owl House: Really Small Problems
programme.desc: King confides in a carnival fortune teller who makes his dream come true, but it comes at a cost.

programme.title: DuckTales: Escape from the ImpossiBin!
programme.desc: Donald Duck and his nephews are reunited with Scrooge after moving into McDuck Manor.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: The Present
programme.desc: When Hiro finds a wrapped present in the closet, he assumes it's from Aunt Cass and takes it in order to figure out what it is. However, after a mix-up, the present becomes lost and Hiro enlists the Big Hero 6 team to track it down.

programme.title: Polaris: Player Select: Never Smooch a Snake
programme.desc: A compilation of top gaming videos from YouTube stars.

programme.title: Polaris: Player Select: The Old Man and the Goose
programme.desc: A compilation of top gaming videos from YouTube stars.

programme.title: Amphibia: Swamp and Sensibility/ Wax Museum
programme.desc: When Anne discovers an old friend who has been living a double life, she becomes fixated on helping him be his true self. The family visits a mysterious roadside oddities museum where every treasure comes with a price.

programme.title: Amphibia: Contagi-Anne/ Family Shrub
programme.desc: Anne fakes getting sick to get off work, but the rest of the family gets sick. Sprig and Polly think their family history is boring, until they uncover family secrets.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Return Policy/ Imperfect Storm
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb assemble a crazy array of batting cage and Doof uses an inator to return things to the store. Mom gets a backyard makeover and calls Candace to come see it, while Doof makes a Have-A-Bad-Day-Inator to rain out a tea party.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Monster From Id/ Gi-Ants
programme.desc: After losing a gift that Jeremy made for her, Candace is determined to recreate it before he realizes it's missing. Candace can't remember what it looks like, and has Phineas and Ferb use their mind machine to recapture her memory of it.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Hand That Rocks the Mabel
programme.desc: Dipper and Mabel discover their seemingly cherubic new neighbour, Lil' Gideon, happens to be the town's adored psychic. But when Dipper convinces Mabel to go on a date with Gideon to question his authenticity, she soon learns that his cuteness can fade.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Little Dipper
programme.desc: Dipper feels self-conscious that Mabel is taller than him and is becoming the alpha twin, so he seeks out a magic way to grow himself the same height. Lil' Gideon takes advantage of Dipper's and Mabel's height discrepancies.

programme.title: The Owl House: Witches Before Wizards
programme.desc: Luz receives a map for a mystical quest from an ancient wizard.

programme.title: The Owl House: Hooty's Moving Hassle
programme.desc: When Luz, Willow and Gus accidentally animate the Owl House, the house runs amok around Bonesborough.

programme.title: Amphibia: Quarreler's Pass/ Toadcatcher
programme.desc: Hop Pop drops Sprig and Polly off at an obstacle-filled mountain trail designed to help them get along. Sasha and Grime must reconcile their differences to escape Newtopia's most skilled warrior, General Yunnan.

programme.title: Amphibia: Civil Wart/ Hop-Popular
programme.desc: Anne exposes Wartwood to a teen romance film, and the town is split on the movie's love triangle. After losing his stand, Hop Pop decides to run for mayor of Wartwood.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Supersonic Sue
programme.desc: Big Hero 6 attempt to thwart a bank robbery and are defeated by Supersonic Sue, an old school roller-skating villain.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Fear Not
programme.desc: Supersonic Stu busts his grandmother, Supersonic Sue, out of prison.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Dipper and Mabel vs. the Future
programme.desc: Mabel decides to plan for her and Dipper's 13th birthday party. Meanwhile, Dipper ventures below the town to find its most shocking secret.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Last Mabelcorn
programme.desc: A new threat leads Mabel to venture into the enchanted realm of the unicorns. Meanwhile, Dipper learns an unexpected twist about the enigmatic Bill Cipher.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Weirdmageddon
programme.desc: Dipper and Mabel Pines are sent to spend the summer with their Great Uncle Sam.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Spear of Selene!
programme.desc: Donald is dragged into a feud between Scrooge and Zeus, while Dewey and Webby search for an artifact that may provide the truth about Dewey's mother.

programme.title: DuckTales: Storkules in Duckburg!
programme.desc: Louie recruits Storkules for his professional monster extermination business, while Storkules faces his greatest challenge: being Donald’s roommate.

programme.title: DuckTales: Treasure of the Found Lamp!
programme.desc: Donald Duck and his nephews are reunited with Scrooge after moving into McDuck Manor.

programme.desc: Donald Duck and his nephews are reunited with Scrooge after moving into McDuck Manor.

programme.desc: An unexpected encounter with an unexpected Pokémon takes Ash on an adventure he'll never forget.

programme.desc: Donald Duck and his nephews are reunited with Scrooge after moving into McDuck Manor.

programme.title: The Owl House: Lost in Language
programme.desc: Luz's pranks at the library lead to unintended consequences.

programme.desc: Hilary is in a jam after embellishing her resume, then landing a catering job that's more than she can handle.

programme.title: My Wife and Kids: Michael's Tribe
programme.desc: Michael decides to be the Indian Chief for Kady's friends on their 'Princess' sleepover.

programme.title: My Wife and Kids: Blackout
programme.desc: Michael goes out of his way to get the family out of the house so he can have solitude.

programme.title: My Wife and Kids: Man of the Year
programme.desc: Michael does not win the Small Businessman of the Year Award and has a bad reaction.

programme.title: My Wife and Kids: Jr.'s Risky Business, Part 1
programme.desc: Michael returns from a night out to find Jr. in a compromising position with his girl.

programme.title: My Wife and Kids: Jr.'s Risky Business, Part 2
programme.desc: Jay and Michael face dealing with Jr. after finding him in a compromising position.

programme.title: My Wife and Kids: Jury Duty
programme.desc: Michael and Jay serve jury duty, but Michael suspects he's the victim of jury tampering.

programme.title: The Wayans Brothers: Big Brother
programme.desc: Marlon and Shawn each volunteer to mentor a 'little brother' from the 'Help a Brother Out' program with varying results.

programme.title: The Wayans Brothers: Saving Private Marlon
programme.desc: While doing research at the local military base for a role in a war movie, Marlon unknowingly enlists in the army.

programme.title: The Wayans Brothers: Jump!
programme.desc: After unintentionally assisting in getting Dee suspended from her job, Shawn and Marlon risk their lives to save it.

programme.title: Movie: Love, Lights, Hanukkah!
programme.desc: A woman prepares her restaurant for the busiest time of the year when she receives the results of her DNA test indicating that she is Jewish. The discovery leads her to a new family, and an unlikely romance over eight nights.

programme.title: Movie: A Timeless Christmas
programme.desc: A man travels from 1903 to 2020, where he meets a woman giving tours of his home and experiences a 21st Century Christmas.

programme.title: Movie: Christmas Comes Twice
programme.desc: A top newscaster finds herself regretting letting her man go five years ago. When a Christmas carnival comes to town, she is brought back in time to reconnect with him.

programme.title: Movie: Never Kiss a Man in a Christmas Sweater
programme.desc: Single mom Maggie is facing Christmas alone until Lucas crashes into her life and becomes an unexpected houseguest. Together they overcome Christmas while finding comfort in their growing bond.

programme.title: Movie: The Sweetest Christmas
programme.desc: A pastry chef makes it to the final round of a renowned baking competition and finds herself asking her high school sweetheart for help. As they grow closer, she realizes the must embrace the Christmas spirit or risk losing a chance at love.

programme.title: Movie: On the Twelfth Day of Christmas
programme.desc: Maggie is thrilled when her long time crush, Mitch, moves to her little town. Once she discovers his love for Christmas has changed she vows to bring his holiday spirit back.

programme.title: Movie: The Nine Lives of Christmas
programme.desc: A handsome bachelor sees his life change before his eyes when he adopts a stray cat.

programme.title: Movie: A Dream of Christmas
programme.desc: A restless young married woman is granted a wish by a Christmas Angel to be single again. She soon realizes that her new life isn't what she bargained for and embarks on a quest to win her husband back.

programme.title: Movie: Christmas Waltz
programme.desc: After a woman's storybook Christmas wedding is canceled, a dance instructor helps her face her fears in life and fulfill her dream of learning to dance.

programme.title: Home and Family
programme.desc: Rascal Flatts member Jay DeMarcus and former beauty queen Allison DeMarcus to share their new show, 'DeMarcus Family Rules.'

programme.title: Movie: A Wish for Christmas
programme.desc: Santa grants a wish for a woman and she gets a chance to prove herself to her boss. Santa's wish only gives her 48 hours and as the clock ticks down, she channels the Christmas magic and speaks her mind all on her own.

programme.title: Movie: Finding Santa
programme.desc: When the Santa who stars in their annual holiday parade falls off his sleigh and injures himself, a woman must go on a quest to find the perfect Santa.

programme.title: Movie: The 40-Year-Old Virgin
programme.desc: Andy Stitzer is 40 years old and has never had sex. His friends decide to make it their mission to rectify the situation, but they hit a roadblock when Andy falls in love with a mother of three who doesn't want sex to enter their relationship.

programme.title: Movie: Step Brothers
programme.desc: When their parents fall in love and decide to marry, two spoiled, middle-aged men who still live at home, are forced to grow up.

programme.title: Movie: The 40-Year-Old Virgin
programme.desc: Andy Stitzer is 40 years old and has never had sex. His friends decide to make it their mission to rectify the situation, but they hit a roadblock when Andy falls in love with a mother of three who doesn't want sex to enter their relationship.

programme.title: Movie: Hot Tub Time Machine

programme.title: South Park: Obama Wins!
programme.desc: There's something in Cartman's bedroom that may change the Presidential election outcome.

programme.desc: From 1979 to 1981, more than two dozen of Atlanta’s black children, mostly boys and young men, disappeared without a trace. Someone was killing the city's most vulnerable children for an unknown reason.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: The Atlanta Serial Killer: The KKK Connection? (Part 2)

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Cabin of No Return
programme.desc: An outdoorsy family of three is determined to build a mammoth off-grid cabin along Idaho's Salmon River after one of their properties was destroyed by a fire. The family takes on rapids to portage out materials and must finish before low tide hits.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Bottle Island
programme.desc: John Beal is ready to leave the city behind and embrace a life off the grid in Isla Mujeres, Mexico. He hires Richart Sowa and his son Eden to build an eco-friendly private floating island made from recycled plastic bottles.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier Exposed: Tsunami Evacuation
programme.desc: An earthquake strikes Homer, triggering a tsunami warning and evacuation. Eivin and Eve traverse treacherous mountain terrain on their first-ever goat hunt and Charlotte creates a special memorial for victims of COVID-19.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier Exposed: Tsunami Evacuation
programme.desc: A tsunami warning triggers a mass evacuation after an Earthquake strikes Homer. Eivin and Eve go on their first goat hunt and Charlotte creates a memorial for COVID-19 victims.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier: Kilcher Kritters
programme.desc: Sharing the homestead with both wild and working animals is at the core of the Kilcher lifestyle. The family reflects on moments of friendship, mishaps, heartaches and utter chaos with these animals as well as Alaska's deadliest predators.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: North Pole
programme.desc: Bryce Ward, mayor of North Pole, and his dad, Jeff, build a family recreation cabin deep in the woods of Alaska with the help of their life-long camping buddies.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Container Dreamhouse
programme.desc: First-time builders Shay and Shae set out to build a home using five shipping containers on a wooded lot in Oklahoma. They hope his background in electrical and welding, and their collection of building materials, helps them finish the job quickly.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Streamside Cottage
programme.desc: Professional treehouse builder Michael 'Murph' Murphy wants to build a cottage retreat for his family in Washington. He enlists his friends to create a natural siding and a massive fishing net for lounging above the living space.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Volcano Home
programme.desc: A couple builds a rainforest retreat within the edge of an active volcano on Hawaii's Big Island.

programme.title: American Chopper: Road Warriors
programme.desc: Senior takes a risk and starts a Spartan Race-inspired build before meeting the client, then has to change course to accommodate his requests, while Junior designs a monster trike, but fabrication troubles may mean missing the unveil.

programme.title: American Chopper: Yanks for the Memories
programme.desc: Senior and the OCC guys auction off a military-themed bike to benefit families of fallen soldiers, and Junior designs a western-inspired motorcycle for country music star Clay Walker.

programme.title: American Chopper: Chopper up the Middle
programme.desc: Senior and Junior begin restoring a 1951 Buick, but don't always go by the book. Senior risks everything by moving designs away from their famous choppers. Junior challenges himself to build a streamlined bike for the MLB Network to impress his dad.

programme.title: American Chopper: Teutul Recall
programme.desc: Junior designs a bike inspired by a futuristic big rig. The OCC team builds a military style bike with a sidecar to benefit a foundation for wounded veterans.

programme.title: American Chopper: Senior's Moment
programme.desc: Senior goes back to his roots and designs a throwback brand of affordable motorcycles to see from the OCC Showroom. Junior builds a bike using multiple aluminum parts.

programme.title: American Chopper: SPLAT!
programme.desc: OCC builds a paintball bike, but Senior and Josh clash over creative. Junior makes a farm-inspired bake. Senior and Junior try to get the Buick running and celebrate Junior's birthday.

programme.title: American Chopper: Guitar Hero
programme.desc: Senior takes on a build for a Vietnam memorial, determined to create a bike worthy of history. Junior is hired by Martin Guitar to design a massive reverse trike, an undertaking that pushes his team to their limits.

programme.title: American Chopper: Strikes and Reverse Trikes
programme.desc: Senior and team struggle to get the vintage-style bike done on time. Junior deals with a complicated assembly on the Martin Guitar reverse trike. Senior surprises Junior with the first theme bike they ever built.

programme.title: American Chopper: You're My Dog...
programme.desc: Junior designs a monster trike and takes a huge financial gamble. Senior and Junior ponder the idea of building a bike together. Josh builds a bike for the local SPCA, headed by Joanie and Senior.

programme.title: American Chopper: Bonkers in Yonkers
programme.desc: Junior attempts his first-ever dually trike. Senior and his team struggle to build two bikes in three weeks. The Teutuls cruise the Buick through Senior's old stomping grounds.

programme.title: American Chopper: The Last Ride
programme.desc: After hearing about demolition plans for the old Orange County Choppers building, Junior asks his dad to build one last bike together in the old shop. Senior agrees but the father-son team's clashing styles threaten to throw the entire project off track.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Maternity Mayhem

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Wedding Day Mishaps

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: I Think You're My Future Wife
programme.desc: Brandon's parents' strict rules surprise his Russian fiancee, Julia. Ukrainian bombshell Yara isn't impressed with fiance Jovi's hometown. Rebecca and her Tunisian beau Zied await visa news. Mike and Natalie's relationship takes an unexpected turn.

programme.desc: Stephanie wants to kick off Christmas with a Black Friday wedding. Randy looks back at beautiful holiday bridal looks, counting down his 12 favourite Christmas styles.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Urine Trouble
