programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dinner Party: The Food Ya Never Ate Episode
programme.desc: Murr, Q, Sal and Joe try a dish they've never eaten, and a special guest stops by. Plus, Q drops a world premiere music video for his diabolical new song.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dinner Party: The Childhood Meals Episode
programme.desc: Murr, Q, Sal and Joe eat a childhood meal with Colin Jost. Plus, Sal fools his mom into thinking she owes 20% of her produce to the government.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dinner Party: The Early Thanksgiving Episode
programme.desc: The guys put their culinary skills to the test by serving dishes the viewers requested. Plus, find out if Joe grew a mustache.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Speech Impediment
programme.desc: Joe, Q, Sal and Murr crack each other up from behind glass, then test out awkward proposals. Plus, the big loser gets tongue-tied while speaking to government officials, and later, Joey Fatone goes behind the scenes on after party.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Bogey Man
programme.desc: The laughing gas flows freely when the guys pose as dental assistants. Later, they make headlines for all the wrong reasons, and get burned giving some campfire tips. Plus, tonight’s big loser scores a hole in none on the links.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Hell on Wheels
programme.desc: The guys try and work out the kinks as physical therapists, then pitch some way out-of-the-box ideas for TV hosts. Plus, the big loser gets rolled over by some speedy ladies.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Sal, Murr, Joe and Q pull desk duty, and then do strangers a solid by barring them from the bathroom. Plus, the big loser learns the hard way that gratuity is not included.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Full Mental Jacket
programme.desc: Joe, Murr, Q and Sal send blood pressure rates sky-high while posing as nurses, then stroll through the store with their wives. Plus, the big loser wishes he could check out early at a pop-up fashion show.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Blue Man Dupe
programme.desc: Murr, Joe, Q and Sal are a little too generous with fellow shoppers at the market, then ask strangers to help them out of a texting jam. Plus, the big loser fights his way, repeatedly, to the best seat in the house.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Eggman
programme.desc: Joe, Q, Sal and Murr go incognito to fool unsuspecting strangers, then pop in for a coffee just in time to miss out on a big prize. Plus, tonight's big loser might just crack under the pressure of his rotten punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Off the Reservation
programme.desc: Murr, Q, Joe and Sal participate in a fake documentary, then find themselves in the middle of a marshmallow throwing contest. Plus, tonight's big loser is the host with the least when he can't find customers' dinner reservations.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Urine Trouble
programme.desc: The guys play receptionists looking for suspicious names. The guys seek marriage advice from strangers after a private eye shares incriminating photos. The big loser goes from pissed off to pissed on in the matter of one punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Irritable Vowel Syndrome
programme.desc: Murr, Sal and Joe seek help from customers when escaping security at the grocery store, then tell bizarre tales to diners at a food court. Plus, the big loser is in consonant hell when he's left looking for a missing letter.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Rock Botton
programme.desc: The guys 'do the farts' with actor Jeff Daniels, and then try to get strangers to take their sides in ridiculous arguments. Later, tonight's loser finds himself up against a wall around a group of college students.

programme.title: Top Secret Videos: Zero Donut Thirty
programme.desc: This episode includes a horrifying Halloween mask removal, a couple attacking a hornet's nest and an impossible task: getting the good donuts out of the conference room without being noticed.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dinner Party: The Food Ya Never Ate Episode
programme.desc: Murr, Q, Sal and Joe try a dish they've never eaten, and a special guest stops by. Plus, Q drops a world premiere music video for his diabolical new song.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Silence of the Lame
programme.desc: Find out who keeps the tags on his jacket so he can return them, which crew member voices the 'sexy beast' commercial, and what chain restaurant the guys used during Sal's 'shush!' punishment at the mall.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Walking Dread

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Lost Boy
programme.desc: Find out which joker once worked as a fish monger, who lied on his resume to snag a TV internship and what chain restaurant the guys used during Sal's 'shush!' punishment at the mall.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Take Me Out at the Ballgame

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Feed a Firefighter
programme.desc: Trisha Yearwood loves to support her local community, so she stops by the local firehouse to visit her buddy, Gary, and see if he and the other firefighters would enjoy a comforting meal.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Food Tour: Midwest Edition
programme.desc: Trisha Yearwood takes a trip down memory lane, recreating her favorite dishes from her time on tour in the Midwest and sharing memories using her own photos and footage.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Mandy Moves To The 615
programme.desc: Trisha Yearwood's good friend, Mandy, has finally made her home in Nashville. Mandy wants to throw a party in her new backyard and invite all her friends and neighbors. Recipes include chicken wings and chorizo quesadillas.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Let's Be Frank
programme.desc: After completing an album of Frank Sinatra covers, Trisha Yearwood is inspired to recreate some of the crooner's favorite Italian meals with her own spin, since Ol' Blue Eyes hated garlic.

programme.title: The Kitchen: Holiday Helpers
programme.desc: The kitchen helpline is open for the holidays and the team is ready to bring serious crowd pleasers like Sunny's hot ham and cheese wreath and Katie Lee's crispy artichoke hearts. Baker Dan Langan stops by to create savoury gingerbread people.

programme.title: The Kitchen: Merry and Bright Ideas
programme.desc: Katie Lee's Prime Rib and Sunny Anderson's Sage Potatoes. Marcela Valladolid shows how to set a holiday table that sparkles, and Jeff Mauro makes his seasonal Orange Cranberry Wreath Cake.

programme.title: The Kitchen: Home for the Holidays
programme.desc: The holidays might look a little different this year, but the Kitchen has tips to make the meal feel special and festive, even with a smaller crew. Jeff Mauro starts with pastrami-rubbed short rib.

programme.title: Chopped: Teen Tournament: Episode Two
programme.desc: Expensive crustaceans are a bit of a shocker in the appetizer baskets, while nerves and mishaps plague round two, and one of the competitors gets flustered.

programme.title: Chopped: Teen Tournament: Episode Three
programme.desc: The new group of teen chefs must grapple with vegan chicken in the first basket. The entree round finds the teens daringly slicing into big butternut squashes and working out their mixed feelings about okra.

programme.title: Chopped: Teen Tournament: Episode Four
programme.desc: Four ambitious teens set their sights on the last remaining place in the Teen Tournament Grand Finale! The heat is on in the appetizer round with a spicy protein and a strong pepper in the basket.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Raccoon Rescue
programme.desc: With the help of local police, Lt. Boudreau and Officer Hannett remove campers found illegally occupying state property. An 8-year-old boy is found riding solo on an ATV, and Officer Crouse helps two raccoon cubs found on the road.

programme.title: North Woods Law: On the Loose
programme.desc: Lt. Boudreau teams up with trainee Masucci to track down a turkey hunter who may have shot from the road. When an animal release goes south, Officer Hannett lends a hand. Then, Officer Canfield races to catch a trespassing dirt biker.

programme.title: North Woods Law: In the Thick of It
programme.desc: At the state's largest ice fishing derby, Officer Canfield looks for the owner of a frozen fishing line while Major Juneau takes command of a mountain rescue. Officer McKee runs radar for snowmobiles. And Officer Cyrs checks on a moose in a bog.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Protect and Preserve: Cracking a Cold Case
programme.desc: Officer Canfield handles a group of ATV riders reported for riding prohibited trails. Officer Holmes investigates a suspected illegal deer kill, and an abandoned car is found on the Androscoggin River that might be linked to a crime.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Protect and Preserve: Guilty Conscience
programme.desc: When a man responsible for a fatal car accident flees the scene, Officer McKee responds to the call. An injured hiker is rescued from a trail in Franconia Notch State Park, and an illegal pheasant hunter is reported.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Trapped
programme.desc: Officer MacFadzen tracks a trapper suspected of poaching, and stealing a trail camera surveying the illegal traps. Officer Lucas investigates the death of an owl. And, officers question a father and son who may have hunted over illegal bait.

programme.title: North Woods Law: No Place Like Home
programme.desc: During a busy "Old Home Day", Officer Delmer patrols the ATV trails. Officer McFazden rescues a trapped barred owl and takes it to be rehabilitated. On Mount Liberty, Officer Towne and trainee LaTourneau save an injured hiker.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Rules of the Game
programme.desc: Officer Canfield responds to a call about an orphaned bear cub. Sgt. Lucas pays an unexpected visit to a hunter suspected of illegal baiting. And Officer Cyrs investigates a large buck shot by a young, nervous hunter during muzzleloader season.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Trapped
programme.desc: Officer MacFadzen tracks a trapper suspected of poaching, and stealing a trail camera surveying the illegal traps. Officer Lucas investigates the death of an owl. And, officers question a father and son who may have hunted over illegal bait.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Protect and Preserve: Guilty Conscience
programme.desc: When a man responsible for a fatal car accident flees the scene, Officer McKee responds to the call. An injured hiker is rescued from a trail in Franconia Notch State Park, and an illegal pheasant hunter is reported.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Crossed Wires
programme.desc: McKenney and Robertson investigate a night hunting complaint. MacCabe tracks an illegal bear kill back to the source. K9 Tundra takes the lead in the harrowing search for a missing elderly man with dementia.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Moose on the Loose
programme.desc: Teams use helicopters to radio-collar moose. The wardens rescue two skiers lost in the backcountry. A drunk sledder is caught and blames his nephew. A warden extinguishes a barn fire. A man with outstanding poaching warrants is arrested.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Things Are Afowl
programme.desc: The wardens in southern Maine head to the wetlands and find hunters using illegal guns, ammo and drugs.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Racking Up the Bad Guys
programme.desc: During moose season in Maine, sometimes family tradition involves breaking the law. Sergeant Simmons investigates a murdered mother deer, while Warden Curtis and canine Cruizer search the backwoods of Downeast by moonlight to find a missing hunter.

programme.title: Monsters Inside Me: Something's Eating My Son Inside Out
programme.desc: A successful model's first steps into motherhood run her straight into a web of blood, pain and terror. What lurking menace could take this woman to the brink of suicide?

programme.title: Monsters Inside Me: My Brain Has Been Hijacked
programme.desc: When a child mysteriously coughs up blood, doctors are shocked to find a modern monster destroying his body from within.

programme.title: Monsters Inside Me: A Deadly Swim
programme.desc: A young girl's love of swimming comes back to haunt her when she develops severe headaches, nausea, and a bizarre rash all over her body. The cause sends everyone reeling.

programme.title: Monsters Inside Me: Dying Abroad
programme.desc: Three mothers, each with a child to love; each on the brink of losing them. A young Peace Corps volunteer gets the assignment of her dreams in a remote village in West Africa But, her dreams become a nightmare when a deadly organism strikes her.

programme.title: Monsters Inside Me: The Flesh Eating Monster
programme.desc: A seemingly innocent cat scratch leaves a veterinary volunteer with a raised and growing wound on her chest. When it begins to move, she's horrified by the thought of a monster growing inside. And, a college student's arm begins oozing a strange liquid.

programme.title: Monsters Inside Me: It Came From a Tick
programme.desc: Debilitating abdominal pain and nausea haunt a mother for more than four years.

programme.title: Monsters Inside Me: Maggots Are Eating Me
programme.desc: A teenager dodges death when he survives getting sucked into a tornado. Then, when his trauma wounds mysteriously don't heal, doctors discover a hideous infection.

programme.title: Monsters Inside Me: My Christmas From Hell
programme.desc: A couple returns home from a Christmas vacation with some uninvited guests. A man discovers that something is eating his heart during the Christmas holidays. A photographer can't breathe on Christmas Eve.

programme.title: Monsters Inside Me: Feeding Frenzy

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Knights in Fake Armor?

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Sub for Sale
programme.desc: The Pawn Stars prepare for battle when a one-man submarine surfaces at the shop. Rick and Corey are presented with an officer's commission from the Revolutionary War.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Book 'Em Rick
programme.desc: One of the first books ever printed comes in the shop. Later, a sitar is brought into the shop.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: No Shoes, No Shirt, No Service

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Finding Fonzie
programme.desc: The guys find an original poem handwritten by Marilyn Monroe and a hybrid rocket engine built into a suitcase. When Rick's autographed Henry Winkler photo goes missing, he goes to great lengths to bring Fonzie home.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Silent Stars and Rebel Cars
programme.desc: Corey checks out a 1940 Buick said to have been owned by Fidel Castro. Will he jump at the chance to own a piece of the communist's sedan? Then, Rick is silenced when Charlie Chaplin's driver's licence cruises into the shop.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Smurf and Turf
programme.desc: The guys check out a 19th century Fisk iron casket. Then, Corey and Chumlee consider making an offer on a massive Smurf collection.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Dam Good Time
programme.desc: Rick negotiates the sale of a cigar box once belonging to JFK. A Civil War era photograph of General Custer arrives in the shop, but its authenticity is called into question.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Chumdae
programme.desc: A legendary 1967 Shelby GT350 speeds into the shop. Then, Corey and Chumlee play with the idea of buying one of the first video game consoles, a Magnavox Odyssey 200. Later, Chumlee seeks the go-ahead from Rick to test out the shop's new ice cream maker.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Chum Fever
programme.desc: Two antique telephones are checked out. Then, Rick spots a rare porcelain bowl made during the Ch'ien dynasty. Later, Chumlee refuses to leave work even though he doesn't feel well.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Reach for Raphael
programme.desc: A print believed to be from Renaissance master Raphael comes into the shop. Then, Corey gets rocked when a 1970s Ibanez guitar is brought in. Later, Corey and Chum try to find out the contents of Rick's will.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Oldest Trick in the Book
programme.desc: The team looks at a limited edition signed copy of 'Seven Years in Tibet' and a Three Stooges projector. Then, Chum has some new policy ideas to help liven up the place.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Et tu, Rick?
programme.desc: There's an air of betrayal at the Gold and Silver Pawn Shop when an super rare ancient Roman "Ides of March" coin comes into the shop.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: King of Pawntus
programme.desc: Dig up some history with the Pawn Stars when an ancient coin comes rolling into the shop. Will Rick walk away with this shiny silver in his pocket or will he end up empty handed?

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Pawn of the Undead
programme.desc: The Pawn Stars stake a claim to an original 1800's Vampire defense kit. Then, Rick gets a chance to buy a work from one of America's most famous artists, James Whistler. Next, Rick takes a look at a James Bond prop from the movie GoldenEye.

programme.desc: The Ortega family’s annual Christmas Eve party is destroyed when a man dressed as Santa, wielding handguns and a homemade flame-thrower, opens fire. Detectives are led down a terrifying path that leads them to a sociopath.

programme.title: Homicide for the Holidays: Christmas Rampage
programme.desc: Two days after Christmas a mass shooting terrorizes a small town. After killing two people and wounding many more the gunman is taken into custody. When police search for answers they uncover the worst family massacre in US history.

programme.title: Homicide for the Holidays: Thanksgiving Terror
programme.desc: A mother is brutally shot to death while driving her sons home from a Thanksgiving celebration. When the hunt for her killer leads to an unlikely suspect, investigators soon realize her murder is not as random as it once seemed.

programme.title: Dateline: Reckless
programme.desc: Lead detectives and family members speak about the case of teenager Michelle Carter who was convicted of bullying her then-boyfriend to kill himself. The involuntary manslaughter conviction of Carter was upheld by the Massachusetts Supreme Court.

programme.title: Dateline: Death Trap
programme.desc: Barbara White, sister of the 'pizza bomber' Brian Wells, gives an exclusive interview claiming that Wells was a victim and was murdered. Wells attempted to rob a bank while saying he had a bomb locked around his neck.

programme.title: Dateline: Death Trap
programme.desc: Barbara White, sister of the 'pizza bomber' Brian Wells, gives an exclusive interview claiming that Wells was a victim and was murdered. Wells attempted to rob a bank while saying he had a bomb locked around his neck.

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles: Exit Strategy
programme.desc: When a vehicle transporting Jada Khaled is ambushed, NCIS must track down the culprit to save her and their case. Meanwhile, Sam is forced to confront Jada for the first time since returning from Sudan.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Table Stakes
programme.desc: The team examines a corpse found floating in a pool; Warrick investigates a mob hit.

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles: Partners
programme.desc: After a diplomatic service van transporting an unknown package from the State Department is hijacked, the team must determine who committed the crime and what has gone missing. Meanwhile, Callen and Sam celebrate five years as partners.

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles: Crimeleon
programme.desc: With Assistant Director Granger critiquing every move, the team must track down a chameleon-like killer who has evaded law enforcement agents across several countries.

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles: Blye, K., Part One
programme.desc: The NCIS team searches for new evidence to prove Kensi Blye's innocence after she is taken into custody as the lead suspect in a murder investigation involving her deceased father's sniper unit.

programme.title: NCIS: Handle With Care
programme.desc: Gibbs and the team work to clear the name of retired Marine Sergeant John Ross when cyanide is found in one of the hundreds of care packages he sends to active-duty Marines.

programme.title: NCIS: One Man's Trash
programme.desc: Gibbs and Ducky see an antique war stick on television that could be the missing murder weapon to a 16-year-old cold case.

programme.title: NCIS: Death From Above
programme.desc: The NCIS headquarters are evacuated after bomb materials and a body are discovered on the roof above the squad room. Also, the team reads the first draft of Ducky's book.

programme.title: NCIS: The Numerical Limit
programme.desc: Gibbs is granted protective custody of a 10-year-old orphaned refugee, Elena, when an NCIS case reveals she is the target of a violent gang.

programme.title: NCIS: Sight Unseen
programme.desc: NCIS searches for a petty officer suspected of assault who escapes when the sheriff transporting him crashes into a lake. Also, Torres works closely with Annie Barth, a key blind witness who heard vital evidence to solve the case.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Musk Who Fell to Earth
programme.desc: When inventor Elon Musk lands in Springfield, he and Homer become fast friends and revolutionize the town's nuclear plant. But when Musk goes overboard and Mr. Burns wants him removed, Homer must figure out a way to break up with him.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Fatzcarraldo
programme.desc: When all the fast food restaurants in Springfield become healthy, Homer turns to the last bastion of greasy food for comfort and digs up some childhood memories along the way.

programme.title: Family Guy: Connie's Celica

programme.title: Family Guy: Cat Fight
programme.desc: When Quagmire opens a cat café in town, Brian decides to take a stand to get the café shut down. Meanwhile, when Meg and Brian get in trouble at school, Lois becomes nervous and decides they need to go to church camp in order to find their way.

programme.desc: A look at killers who are hiding in plain sight.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: A Jewel Stolen
programme.desc: When a young mother is found murdered in her own home, investigators must untangle a web of lies using wiretaps and secret recordings to ultimately pick up the trail of her cold-blooded killer.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: Deadly Hymn
programme.desc: The murder of a beloved and talented church organist sends police on a disturbing search for answers.

programme.title: American Monster: Looks Can Kill
programme.desc: When mysterious and beautiful Rebecca Thudin meets the dashing Larry Fenton, a whirlwind romance is sparked. The rich, successful pair seem to be a match made in heaven, until a murder exposes a tangled web of lies, deceit and buried secrets.

programme.title: Deadly Affairs: Burned by Desire
programme.desc: Cesar and Christina Laurean's Marine marriage ranks perfection, but when Lance Corporal Maria Lauterbach, joins the regiment, disaster strikes. Then, Ann and Ted Throneberry are perfect, until long hours away from home leave one heart burned by betrayal.

programme.title: Deadly Affairs: Spellbound
programme.desc: The passion between Mirinda and Sam Boob is red-hot, until lies and betrayals tarnish their happiness. And, Tony Hayes loves being a model officer/ladies' man. Monique Johnson catches his wandering eye. When another lover looms, who will pay the price?

programme.title: Married With Secrets: Gambling With Death
programme.desc: Ernest and Charlene Scherer are found beaten and stabbed to death in their exclusive Northern California community. It appears to be a robbery gone wrong, until investigators hone in on the motive.

programme.title: Married With Secrets: Fear the Ether Man
programme.desc: A serial rapist known as the Ether Man lurks in the shadows of Albuquerque, New Mexico. Victims can't identify the masked attacker and worse still, it looks like he's expanding his hunting grounds.

programme.title: Married With Secrets: Obsession Has Its Price
programme.desc: Bill Douglas is a respected doctor at Tufts University in Boston. But his focus isn't on science – it's on a bombshell prostitute he met in a red light district called the Combat Zone. Together, they lead double lives… leading to someone's murder.

programme.title: Married With Secrets: Fatal Fixation
programme.desc: When Ignacio Garraus meets Shawna Nelson, there's instant heat – despite them both being married to other people. While he's just looking for a good time, she's falling in love.

programme.title: Home Alone: First Flame
programme.desc: Sophia Putney-Wilcox is excited to start her senior year of high school after ending her abusive relationship with her boyfriend Adam. Unable to take the rejection, Adam breaks into her house with a bottle of gasoline and a lighter.

programme.title: Home Alone: Banking on Fear
programme.desc: Valerie and Matthew Yussman have their worlds turned upside down when masked intruders break into their home. But this is no normal robbery -- these professional criminals want $1 million and they will use a bomb to ensure they get it.

programme.title: Home Alone: A Mother and a Maniac
programme.desc: On the night of May 10, 2017, Haley McHam decides to leave her abusive partner Jamie. But when Jamie shows up the next day, nobody could have predicted the tragic home invasion that will leave Haley pleading for her life.

programme.title: Nightmare Next Door: Death in the Dark
programme.desc: When Audrey Giannotti is found shot to death in her basement apartment her family is horrified. The cluttered crime scene points to a robbery gone wrong, but police suspect someone close to Audrey.

programme.title: Nightmare Next Door: Hair of the Dog
programme.desc: When Debbie Fagan is found shot to death in her car, the small town of Monrovia, Maryland fears the worst. Who would want to do this to a loving mother of two? But as detectives dig into Debbie's past, they uncover a web of lies and deceit.

programme.title: Nightmare Next Door: Gone
programme.desc: In Stockton, California, 18-year old Jessyca Arro meets a dark fate. The twists and turns in the case keep this killer one step ahead until one last clue leads detectives to the mother lode.

programme.title: Weaponology: Vertical Take-Off
programme.desc: The Vertical Take-Off aircraft are the most innovative weapons at present day.

programme.title: Warrior POV: Road to Baghdad
programme.desc: See the shot by shot firefights in the 21 day bloody battle for Baghdad from the warrior's point of view.

programme.title: Warrior POV: Screaming Eagles in Afghanistan
programme.desc: In 2010, the 'Screaming Eagles' of the 101st Airborne Division face off against the Taliban during Operation Dragon Strike. The American soldiers of the 101st head up Afghanistan's 'Highway to Hell' to take back the countryside from a deadly enemy.

programme.title: Weaponology: Artillery
programme.desc: Artillery is ever present on the battlefield, and always evolving to keep pace with warfare. From catapults to cannons, ballista to battleships, gunpowder to giant super guns, chart the evolution of this powerful dynasty of destruction.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Closing the Ring
programme.desc: By late summer 1944, the Allied forces in north-west Europe were thrusting towards the German border. Paris and Antwerp were liberated, but then supply problems brought the advance to a halt. Meanwhile, Stalin had halted his main thrust towards Berlin.

programme.title: WWII's Greatest Raids: SAS vs. Rommel
programme.desc: The SAS launches a daring raid behind enemy lines on a German airfield in the Sahara Desert. If they succeed in destroying Rommel's supply planes, their action could turn the tide of war and allow the British to drive the Germans out of North Africa.

programme.title: WWII's Greatest Raids: Rangers Lead the Way
programme.desc: United States Army Rangers spearhead one of the biggest amphibious landings in history: the Allied invasion of France. They must scale vertical cliffs before facing the enemy, then destroy the guns that threaten to blow the Allied forces out of the water.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Britain at Bay
programme.desc: By the end of June 1940, Hitler was victorious in Western Europe. Nazi Germany now controlled Denmark, Norway, the Netherlands, Belgium and France. Only Britain remained defiant. But the Fuehrer was certain that it could not hold out for long.

programme.title: WWII's Greatest Raids: SAS vs. Rommel
programme.desc: The SAS launches a daring raid behind enemy lines on a German airfield in the Sahara Desert. If they succeed in destroying Rommel's supply planes, their action could turn the tide of war and allow the British to drive the Germans out of North Africa.

programme.title: Weaponology: Artillery

programme.title: Warrior POV: Screaming Eagles in Afghanistan

programme.title: The Cowboy: Hollywood vs. History
programme.desc: The story of the Old West as it was and as it was portrayed by the giants of cinema. Legendary lawmen like Wyatt Earp and 'Wild Bill' Hickok, infamous outlaws like Jesse James and Billy the Kid, and epic showdowns like the Gunfight at the OK Corral.

programme.title: The Cowboy: Movies That Shaped America's Myth
programme.desc: Celebrating the icons and legends of the American West as immortalized by Hollywood. From the great stars like Clint Eastwood, John Wayne, and Steve McQueen, to the great directors like John Ford, Sergio Leone, and Sam Peckinpah.

programme.title: How the World Ends: Pandemic Pandemonium
programme.desc: History has taught us that when it comes to new viruses, humankind is still vulnerable, despite modern medicine. Meet people who are determined to survive the next global pandemic and the chaos that will ensue.

programme.title: How the World Ends: Nostradamus
programme.desc: Nostradamus' prophecies have predicted some of the most dramatic and tragic events in history with chilling accuracy, and the worst to come. There are many among his followers who say that he was not sealing us to this fate, but warning us against it.

programme.title: How the World Ends: Planet X
programme.desc: A look at the giant hidden planet with a gravitational pull so strong that it would literally cause the earth to turn upside down.

programme.title: How the World Ends: Alien Invasion
programme.desc: With the recent discovery of thousands of earth-like planets in the universe the search for intelligent alien life continues. Some astronomers warn, when we find it, we should be prepared for advanced hostile extra-terrestrial species capable of anything.

programme.title: American Titans: Edison vs. Tesla
programme.desc: In the late 1800's a new life-changing electrical industry emerges with the two greatest minds of the day, Thomas Edison and Nikola Tesla, backing opposing positions on how the multi-million dollar industry will transmit power for the next century.

programme.title: American Titans: Vanderbilt vs. Drew
programme.desc: Railroad kingpin Cornelius Vanderbilt takes on his old friend Daniel Drew in a Wall Street war for the Erie Railroad. Vanderbilt has millions, but sly Drew and his protégés, Jay Gould and Jim Fisk, are set to break the bank of America's biggest tycoon.

programme.title: CIA Declassified: Castro and the Cold Cream
programme.desc: The true story of how the CIA turned Fidel Castro's lover into a deadly assassin and sent her on a mission to kill their formidable enemy.

programme.desc: With testimony from those directly involved, the de-classified truth of the 15-year manhunt for Osama bin Laden is revealed.

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: A Big Wow on Alabama's Lake Wedowee
programme.desc: After spending years renting on Lake Wedowee in Alabama, Chris and Jenny are ready to purchase a vacation home for their family. A local agent helps the couple land a charming lakefront property, but it's in need of major improvements.

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Loving Life on Lake Tawakoni in Texas
programme.desc: Water enthusiasts Matt and Heather are looking for a vacation property close to their Dallas home on Lake Tawakoni in Texas.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Dated Cabin Turned Retreat

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Clearwater Camp
programme.desc: The team take on a cabin in Industry, ME, that hasn't been touched since the 1970's. Loads of issues arise once the snow melts and they start digging in.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Off-The-Grid Renovation
programme.desc: Chase Morrill and his team renovate an off-the-grid hunting cabin deep in the woods of Oxford, ME. They have a budget of $20,000 and a time frame of six weeks. They face many challenges associated with building off-the-grid.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: City Slickers Off the Grid
programme.desc: Chase and his team of builders renovate an off-the-grid camp for a family of city slickers. With limited resources, Chase and his team work to incorporate the comforts of city living into the camp.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Santa Barbara, California
programme.desc: Casey Webb's tasty trek takes him to Santa Barbara, California, where he first feasts on a 2-pound portion of steamed local crab. Then he meets up with a tri-tip steak sandwich served with homemade barbecue sauce and apple horseradish.

programme.title: Man v. Food: San Jose, California
programme.desc: Casey Webb's epicurean expedition takes him to San Jose, CA. His first stop is a one-of-a-kind drive-in for a crispy and golden falafel sandwich.

programme.title: Man v. Food: San Francisco
programme.desc: Adam devours a Mission Style Super Burrito, ginormous sandwiches, and a two-gallon monster sundae.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Mystic, Connecticut

programme.title: Man v. Food: Hall of Fame: Bring the Heat
programme.desc: In Casey's years of facing off against food, he's taken on his fair share of heat. Casey's counting down the hottest, culminating in a challenge so spicy it may crack the Scoville scale and the number.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Hall of Fame: Most-Epic Wins

programme.desc: Investigators get involved after a serial arsonist begins starting blazes all over Washington DC.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Nailed
programme.desc: Just before she's scheduled to testify against her alleged rapist, a woman is murdered on her front lawn. 15 years later, investigators used new technology to finally catch the woman's killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sign of the Zodiac
programme.desc: A serial killer that admires the infamous Zodiac Killer prowls New York City's streets for six years, trying to kill one person for every zodiac sign. Police use a variety of forensic tools to arrest the culprit.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Letter Perfect
programme.desc: A healthy young man dies mysteriously in his sleep. There are no signs of trauma or injury, but toxicology tests reveal a lethal dose of lidocaine in his blood.

programme.title: Forensic Files: True Lies

programme.title: Forensic Files: Strong Impressions

programme.title: Forensic Files: All Wet

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shot of Vengeance

programme.title: Secrets of the Earth: The Birth and Death of the Planet
programme.desc: Tracing the series of events that developed the Earth from its birth in the solar system to where the Earth could be billions of years ahead from now.

programme.title: Secrets of the Earth: Death Traps: Quicksand, Whirlpools and Riptides
programme.desc: The interaction that land and water has to the Earth not only nurtures life but can also cause strange death traps. Quicksand, whirlpools and rip currents are death traps, ready to take away the unwary.

programme.title: Secrets of the Earth: It Fell From Space
programme.desc: Exposing the secrets behind asteroids, comets and space debris that fall to Earth from space. Investigating the latest technologies that detect space objects before coming to Earth and the spacecraft designed to stop them.

programme.title: Weird Earth: Mist Domes and Square Waves

programme.title: Weird Earth: Ghost Ships and Blood Ice

programme.title: Strangest Weather on Earth: Worldwide Weather Wipeouts

programme.title: Strangest Weather on Earth: Noisy Nature

programme.title: Tornado Alley: I Survived: In My House

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Tied and Feathered

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Blind Justice
programme.desc: Find out why the Jokers killed the idea of Joe going shirtless in the boxing ring, and which of the Jokers loves dancing but is no good at it.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Mime and Punishment
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Murr and Q put the nasty in namaste when they lead guided meditations. Tonight's big loser gets boxed in with a 24-hour punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Damned If You Do
programme.desc: Find out which joker once included inline skating as a skill on his resume, who was a mathlete and a bowler in high school and which joker was afraid of the dark as a child.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Up Loser's Creek
programme.desc: Find out which joker ran for Congress as a write-in candidate, which joker was a top-notch salesman before starting the show and who had a job in finance.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Rubbed the Wrong Way
programme.desc: Find out why the food court was picked for the 'stalk and text' challenge, what classic comedy inspired 'over the shoulder,' and who was lucky enough to test out the flying contraption for Joe the Genie.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Flatfoot the Pirate
programme.desc: Who made the call to give Murr a face full of slushie at the mall? How did the Jokers keep their props secret from each other before Laugh Man Standing? And whose breast milk did Pirate Sal chug?

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Remember the Pact
programme.desc: Find out how many mousetraps accidentally went off during Q's turn in 'hold this please,' what made Joe and Murr join 'team skins' in Columbus park, and how Murr's tech punishment made show history.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Crash Test Dummies
programme.desc: Murr, Sal, Joe and Q take some customers for a wild ride, and things get messy when they ask fellow shoppers for a hand. Plus, the big losers suffer a monster punishment that leaves them crushed.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Closer
programme.desc: Q, Joe, Sal and Murr get tech help from some confused tutors, then play hot potato in a shoe store. Plus, the big loser wishes he could press 'escape' during a brutal coffee shop punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Dumbbell
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q and Murr test their parental instincts by reading their daughters' diaries, then give presentations that are anything but normal. Later, tonight's big loser gets painfully honest with bodybuilders at the gym.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Cake Loss
programme.desc: Q, Sal, Murr and Joe mean no disrespect to patrons at a food court, then cut to the chase while posing as tailors. Later, strangers pick sides in a wild debate, and tonight's big loser takes the cake with his crumby punishment.

programme.title: The Last Alaskans: Biting Back

programme.title: The Last Alaskans: Laying Down Their Legacy

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Survival Shelter: On the Verge of Collapse

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off The Deep End XL: Paradise on the Gulf
programme.desc: On the Gulf of Mexico, Lucas transforms a client's tiny pool and designs an outdoor water room that even a mermaid could love. Later, Lucas is challenged to build a Roman-inspired pool for his clients who dream of living in a castle by the sea.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Survival Shelter: On the Verge of Collapse
programme.desc: The Raneys have their hands full when they move a cabin to a flood-proof foundation, defend against invasive hogs and craft a rice patty garden in a flood zone. In Missouri, the Raneys are determined to save a family's collapsing treehouse cabin.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Fiesta de Laguna

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier: Blood, Sweat and Beers

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier: Fear and Floating

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier: Calling All Bears
programme.desc: Spring has sprung and there's no shortage of needs on the homestead. Atz Sr. bow-hunts to restock dwindling food supplies. Otto, Charlotte and August scramble to protect livestock at the head of the bay. Atz Lee develops a new foothold in the wilderness.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier: Mobility, Mo' Problems

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier: One Small Flush for Man
programme.desc: As spring draws to a close, Otto and August dig into a monumental plumbing project, and Eivin attempts to help but loses control of his truck. Atz Sr. searches for two predators threatening the Kilcher property. Atz Lee and Jane help Shane with his cabin.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier: The Lost Episode
programme.desc: A never-before-seen lost episode travels back to before Atz Lee's near-fatal accident, as he planned a surprise ceremony to renew his vows with Jane at the head of the bay. Other Kilchers struggle while preparing for the big event.

programme.title: Destination Fear: Saratoga County Homestead
programme.desc: The team heads to Saratoga County Homestead where thousands of dead bodies literally vanished, and captures on camera something that is from their worst nightmares.

programme.title: Destination Fear: Old Bourbon Distillery
programme.desc: The team heads to Kentucky to explore one of America's oldest bourbon distilleries. Dakota has a theory that quick and violent deaths cause some of the most intense hauntings, and he believes this house of horrors is the place to test it.

programme.title: Destination Fear: Randolph County Infirmary
programme.desc: The team pulls up to the Indiana infirmary where something terrorized Tanner five years ago. They cross the threshold again, armed with horrifying new details about the nightmarish experience.

programme.title: Destination Fear: Joliet Prison
programme.desc: It's sweet revenge for Chelsea when she takes the team to Chicago's historic and utterly terrifying Joliet Prison. Terrible things happen once they separate inside its imposing walls and one member experiences their most sickening night ever.

programme.title: Destination Fear: Rolling Hills Asylum

programme.title: Destination Fear: Trans-Allegheny Lunatic Asylum

programme.title: Destination Fear: Old Idaho Penitentiary
programme.desc: After many nights of torment by the paranormal, Alex finally gets his chance to pick a haunted location for the team to investigate. And he is ready to get even. He has planned the most terrifying experiment for Dakota yet at an infamous Idaho prison.

programme.title: Spookley the Square Pumpkin and the Christmas Kittens

programme.desc: Bluey, Bingo and Missy pretend to be pirates; Bingo loses her favourite toy right before bedtime; Bluey builds a new pretend house.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Shorts: A Flower for Minnie

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales of Ladybug and Cat Noir: Mr. Pigeon

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales of Ladybug and Cat Noir: Lady Wifi

programme.title: Big City Greens: Times Circle/ Super Gramma
programme.desc: Tilly and Remy put on a sidewalk play while Cricket and Bill meet their favorite costumed superheroes. Cricket and Tilly try to keep Gramma at home while she recovers from eye surgery.

programme.title: Raven's Home: Smoky Flow
programme.desc: The kids form a band called the Chi-Lectives and film a video in Tess’ apartment. When things get out of hand with a smoke machine, Raven discovers they were home alone.

programme.title: Raven's Home: Twister, Sister
programme.desc: When Booker challenges Nia's efforts as an activist, she follows her dad to where he's reporting on a storm to prove to herself and her brother that she is indeed an activist and not a "positivist."

programme.title: Raven's Home: Lost at Chel-Sea

programme.title: NCIS: One Step Forward
programme.desc: Sara Carter begs Gibbs to investigate her mother's murder as she believes the local authorities convicted the wrong man. Also, Abby is awarded a dinner reservation to a new five-star restaurant, and must decide who to invite.

programme.title: NCIS: Two Steps Back
programme.desc: When evidence reveals an NCIS team member is a hitman’s latest target, the team must search through old case files to determine who is seeking vengeance.

programme.title: NCIS: Fallout
programme.desc: While Gibbs attends the memorial service for a friend who was lost at sea, he discovers that the deceased captain has been hiding in a fallout shelter after his boat was attacked and he swam to shore.

programme.title: NCIS: Date With Destiny
programme.desc: Sloane is adamant that a man who held her hostage and tortured her years ago in Afghanistan, and was believed to have been killed following her rescue, is alive and in D.C.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: She's Got Us
programme.desc: When Lindsay and Halstead arrive at the scene of a shooting, they discover the only survivor is a young girl. Meanwhile, Antonio and Olinsky look into a pyramid scheme.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Start Digging
programme.desc: When the team finds the body of a widowed, single-mother, they are shocked to discover that the victim was in constant contact with Voight's now-reformed son, Justin.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: The Silos
programme.desc: Intelligence investigates a gruesome case. Upon further examination, it appears the victim was wearing a CPD issued wire at the time of his death. Meanwhile, Burgess meets her new partner, who came from a terrible assignment.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Made a Wrong Turn
programme.desc: When Burgess and Tay respond to a report of vandalism, they find a badly beaten young man. It appears the young man's fiancée is missing. Meanwhile, Lindsay has a surprise for Halsted, and Fogel berates Platt.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: A War Zone
programme.desc: Intelligence is tasked with tracking down the dealers of fentanyl, a drug that has been linked to multiple overdoses around the city. As they investigate possible sources, the team uncovers a series of dealers in a college smuggling ring.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Some Friend
programme.desc: After receiving a complaint, Burgess and Sorensen find the body of a young girl inside a baseball player’s home. There is conflict in the case when it is determined the player is friends with Olinsky.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: 300,000 Likes
programme.desc: Voight calls the team to investigate a homicide involving the only witness in a rape and murder case against an extremely young man. Intelligence investigates the accused's family to see if someone was paid to take out the victim.

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent: Bombshell
programme.desc: Detectives investigate the suspicious death of the son of a famous stripper-turned-model.

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent: Endgame
programme.desc: As death row prisoner Mark Ford Brady nears his end, he asks to see Detective Goren in hopes to extend his sentence and leads him to hidden scrapbooks which chronicle unsolved cases and victims. Goren uncovers a familiar picture, her mother Frances.

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent: Renewal
programme.desc: A police recruit named a hero after breaking up a bodega robbery is found murdered soon after. Detectives Logan and Wheeler initially suspect it had something to do with the recruit's heroism, but discover his girlfriend has suddenly gone missing.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Disappearance of Sandi Johnson
programme.desc: Sandi Johnson always put her kids first. When she vanished without a word, her loved ones were frantic. Police discovered dark secrets in Sandi's marriage and several men in her life. Which one of them had something to hide?

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: 12 Minutes on Elm Street
programme.desc: Cousins Nick Brady and Haile Kifer were best friends. To their family, they seemed like typical teenagers. Turns out, the cousins had a secret that led to tragedy. The story divided a small town and sparked a national debate.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: In the Middle of the Night
programme.desc: After college student Angie Samota was stabbed to death, police had no shortage of suspects. A crucial clue narrowed their list to one name, but it would be years before technology and a tenacious friend came together to help unravel this mystery.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Missing Marie
programme.desc: Marie Singleton was a single mom who fell hard for Andre Jackson, a single dad raising his two kids. The couple married and seemed happy. Then Marie vanished and investigators discovered secrets. Was her disappearance related to her undercover job?

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Deadly Intent
programme.desc: Connie and Larry Hoagland built a life centered on faith and family. Then, a vicious attack threatened it all. Someone wanted Connie dead. But who? After a bomb exploded underneath her car, secrets started to emerge.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: A Bronx Tale
programme.desc: Eric Glisson was convicted of a murder he swore he didn't commit. To prove his innocence, he had to find the real killers, unearthing their long-held secrets. It would take years for the truth to be revealed, but could it set him free?

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries: Shroud of Turin
programme.desc: Re-enactments of stories in which viewers participate to help solve cases.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries: Burbank Robber's / BC Sea Monster

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries: Journey to Murder
programme.desc: Role-playing fantasy game murder; lightning family; 'Thelma and Louise' duo; Pennsylvania prison love.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries: Seattle Punk Rock Star Murder
programme.desc: Seattle punk rock star murder; 'Billy the Kid'; wanted nanny; psychic dreams.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Terminator Terror
programme.desc: A security camera captures a crazed man who smashes the window of a parked car with his face, continuing a superhuman rampage seemingly uninjured. Experts investigate and suspect he could be the result of a cybernetically enhanced human experiment.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Doomsday Vegas UFO
programme.desc: After cameras capture footage of a UFO over Las Vegas, officials claim it's just a meteor, but some suspect something far stranger. Using cutting-edge tech, experts investigate if it's evidence of an alien visit or a top-secret military project.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Secrets of the Himalaya Alien
programme.desc: When a bizarre, alien skeleton is found in an abandoned compound in the Himalayas, some speculate that it's the corpse of a newly-dead dinosaur, and using cutting-edge tech, experts investigate if it's evidence of a top-secret Jurassic Park.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Alien in the Abyss
programme.desc: When footage of a strange deep-sea vessel is uncovered, experts wonder if its evidence of an autonomous alien craft sent to explore earth, and using cutting-edge tech, investigators follow the clues to an unexpected explanation.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Doomsday Vegas UFO
programme.desc: After cameras capture footage of a UFO over Las Vegas, officials claim it's just a meteor, but some suspect something far stranger. Using cutting-edge tech, experts investigate if it's evidence of an alien visit or a top-secret military project.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Curse of Poltergeist Hill
programme.desc: When a ghostly encounter in a cemetery is caught on camera, experts use cutting-edge tech and the latest science to investigate if something paranormal is at play.

programme.title: Shipwreck Secrets: Beyond the Bermuda Triangle
programme.desc: The disappearance of the SS Cotopaxi helped launch the legend of the Bermuda Triangle. Today, a team of experts follow fresh leads with cutting-edge tech to investigate if a mysterious wreck off the coast of Florida is indeed the long-lost ship.

programme.title: Shipwreck Secrets: Curse of the Armada Graveyard
programme.desc: A cutting-edge investigation into a deep-sea graveyard of twenty-five shipwrecks reveals the dark secrets of the biggest naval battle in history. Using the latest tech, experts follow new evidence into the mysterious abyss of long-lost battleships.

programme.title: Shipwreck Secrets: Haunting at Lake Erie
programme.desc: A mysterious shipwreck at the bottom of Lake Erie could be the oldest wreck in America's most notorious ship graveyard, and using cutting-edge underwater archaeological methods, experts investigate new leads in this 200-year-old cold case.

programme.title: Shipwreck Secrets: Titanic's Lost Sister
programme.desc: When a sister ship of the Titanic gets embroiled in war with a hidden enemy, the former luxury liner is sent to the bottom of the ocean; new discoveries and cutting-edge underwater technology might finally reveal the secret history of its sinking.

programme.title: Shipwreck Secrets: Ghost Fleet of Doom
programme.desc: Discoveries reveal the treasures of a ghost fleet of Japanese ships at the bottom of the South Pacific, and using cutting-edge underwater technology, experts are investigating a top-secret superweapon that could have changed the course of World War II.

programme.title: Secrets of the Lost: Egypt's Buried Wonders
programme.desc: Archaeologists and NASA have teamed up to use cutting-edge satellite technology in search of the lost pyramids, cities, and treasures that, until now, were undiscovered, as Ancient Egypt's greatest secrets might still be buried beneath the sand.

programme.title: Secrets of the Lost: Egypt's Greatest Treasures
programme.desc: The world's leading experts on ancient Egypt reveal the greatest treasures and discoveries of the great empire of the Nile.

programme.title: Secrets of the Lost: Egypt's Atlantis: The New Treasures
programme.desc: After experts discover an ancient lost city off the coast of Egypt, the race to unearth its priceless relics and bring this mysterious sunken world back to life begins, revealing the doomsday event that caused it to sink into the sea.

programme.title: Secrets of the Lost: Secrets of the Alien Relic
programme.desc: A strange, alien artifact discovered in the ruins of an ancient Greek shipwreck holds the secrets of a technology thousands of years ahead of its time. Now experts are using cutting-edge science to reveal what this mysterious device was used for.

programme.title: Secrets of the Lost: Pompeii: After Apocalypse
programme.desc: The latest scientific investigations reveals the untold story of how a cataclysmic eruption transformed an entire region.

programme.title: 'Til Death Do Us Part: While You Were Sleeping
programme.desc: Dr. Mark Wangler and his wife Kathy appear to be living the middle-class dream: two sons, financial security, and a strong faith. But on September 4th, 2006, their façade falls down around them as a cold pre-meditated execution tears their family apart.

programme.title: 'Til Death Do Us Part: Don't Shoot!
programme.desc: In 2015 in Newaygo County, Michigan, Marty and Glenna Duram are found gunned down in their own home. At the heart of the crime is their marriage. It's a bizarre story that involves drugs, stolen money, and a pet parrot who is an eyewitness.

programme.title: 'Til Death Do Us Part: The House Out on Wade Road
programme.desc: Byron and Michele Wright overcome broken homes to find solace in one another. But when their blissful union falls apart and a new man arrives on the scene, it unearths violent secrets and a shocking truth.

programme.title: 'Til Death Do Us Part: Behind Closed Doors
programme.desc: To most people, teenage sweethearts Steven and Michelle Gibson seem to be happily married. They have four children and live a fun and adventurous life together. But the couple is harboring a dark secret, one that will tear the family apart.

programme.title: Twisted Sisters: Her Own Medicine
programme.desc: The tight-knit relationship between the Plummer sisters crumbles as a series of fires and an inheritance poisons the water and one sister watches as the other dies a slow, painful death.

programme.title: Twisted Sisters: Cold as Ice
programme.desc: A family's search for new beginnings backfires when their move from Hawaii to Alaska creates an environment perfect for murder.

programme.title: 'Til Death Do Us Part: Five Months of Hell
programme.desc: Chris and Theresa Lockhart seem like a perfectly matched couple. But when one of them vanishes, it leads to five months of hell for everyone and a final, shocking act that reveals all.

programme.title: Married With Secrets: Missing in Alaska
programme.desc: Mike Dixiano is heartbroken when his wife Angela Dixiano dies from organ failure after a lifelong battle with drugs and alcohol. Friends and family grieve her death, but when investigators can't find a death certificate, her husband comes under scrutiny.

programme.title: Twisted Sisters: Cold as Ice
programme.desc: A family's search for new beginnings backfires when their move from Hawaii to Alaska creates an environment perfect for murder.

programme.title: 'Til Death Do Us Part: Five Months of Hell
programme.desc: Chris and Theresa Lockhart seem like a perfectly matched couple. But when one of them vanishes, it leads to five months of hell for everyone and a final, shocking act that reveals all.

programme.title: Married With Secrets: Gambling With Death
programme.desc: Ernest and Charlene Scherer are found beaten and stabbed to death in their exclusive Northern California community. It appears to be a robbery gone wrong, until investigators hone in on the motive.

programme.title: Twisted Sisters: Her Own Medicine
programme.desc: The tight-knit relationship between the Plummer sisters crumbles as a series of fires and an inheritance poisons the water and one sister watches as the other dies a slow, painful death.

programme.title: Wicked Attraction: A Lover's Betrayal
programme.desc: In May of 1996, a woman disappears from the parking lot of a Ventura, CA department store. As detectives learn the woman's husband has been leading a double life, involved in drugs and an affair.

programme.title: Wicked Attraction: Innocence Lost
programme.desc: In April of 2001, police in Southern California find the body of a missing teenager. As the story unfolds, police make discoveries that lead them to the mysterious disappearance of another young girl over half a decade earlier.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: NXIVM
programme.desc: The leader of NXIM is accused of operating a secret sorority that treated women a slaves and branded them for life.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: By the River's Edge
programme.desc: A young woman is found dead along the banks of a North Carolina river. A man is convicted for her murder. But is he truly guilty, or the victim of over-zealous investigators? A crusading attorney, certain he's innocent, fights to free him from prison.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: Can Words Kill?
programme.desc: A teenager commits suicide. And, in the aftermath, his parents discover an online relationship far deeper and far darker than they had realized.

programme.title: The Shadows of Death: The Protector
programme.desc: Doris Bradley moved her family to idyllic small town Spring Valley, Illinois, to escape the violence of Chicago. When her 16-year-old daughter Diamond disappears, she fears the worst, and police uncover secrets that may have cost her her life.

programme.title: The Shadows of Death: The Oath
programme.desc: In search of a better life, the Shahanazari family immigrated from Iran to Glendale, California. But when the youngest son, Chris, is murdered in a violent home invasion, his older brother Sevan fears he himself is to blame.

programme.title: The Shadows of Death: The Pledge
programme.desc: Debbie Smith receives the call every mother dreads: her son, Matthew, has unexpectedly died at college. As police investigate the circumstances of his death, they discover it was more than an accident, and that those closest to him may be to blame.

programme.title: The Shadows of Death: The Promise
programme.desc: When mother of three Christine Sheddy vanishes without a trace, police are sure she left of her own volition. But her mother, Lynn, knows Christine would never abandon her children.

programme.title: Web of Lies: High on Love
programme.desc: High school student Brandon Wentzell falls for blonde beauty Clarissa Chistiakov online. But the course of virtual love doesn't run smooth as the past collides with a toxic present, shattering lives.

programme.title: Web of Lies: The Sick Boy
programme.desc: A young mother turns to the internet desperate for help and advice when her young son mysteriously falls ill.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Bittersweet Sixteen
programme.desc: Angela Allen joins a social networking site where she soon falls in love. After weeks of texting, they decide to meet in person. Their first meeting seems to trouble Angela, but when she goes out for a second time, she never comes home.

programme.title: Combat Tech: Armor
programme.desc: An in-depth, action-packed look at the most advanced armor technologies, from body armor to heavy duty composites that make the Abrams tank the best protected and the most lethal vehicle on the modern battlefield.

programme.title: Combat Tech: Bombers
programme.desc: Go inside the most dominant and lethal military aircraft, from the bombers that won the War to the B-52, from the stealth B-2 to the most advanced and top secret bombers of the future.

programme.title: Combat Tech: ROVs
programme.desc: Go inside the robotic warriors and unmanned war machines that are taking their place on the front lines and spearheading a revolution on the modern battlefield.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: Hitler's Highways
programme.desc: Hitler promises to make Germany great again by creating 14,000 miles of freeway and building one and half million 'People's Cars' every year. Instead, the Nazi war economy relies on millions of forced labourers and prisoners.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Mussolini: The Father of Fascism
programme.desc: This is the story of the rise and fall of the man who became a role model to Hitler and some of history's worst dictators of the twentieth century and beyond, Benito Mussolini.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Kim: North Korea's Evil Dynasty
programme.desc: North Korea's evil dictator, Kim Jong-il, ruled his country for 17 years without mercy. While personally enriching himself, he let his people starve to death and threatened to bring the world to the brink of a third world war.

programme.title: Ace in the Hole
programme.desc: Although the falling of Baghdad took only 21 days, the capture of Saddam Hussein took eight more months. Learn firsthand how the United Sates Army investigators tracked every lead until their final raid uncovered the Iraqi dictator in his spider hole.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Mao: China's Chairman of Death
programme.desc: Mao Zedong, Supreme Leader of Communist China for 30 years, is one of the 20th Century's most ruthless tyrants. His reign of cruelty and revenge, transforms him to a position of authority so great, his personality cult remains to this day.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Kim: North Korea's Evil Dynasty

programme.title: The Civil War: Brothers Divided: Battle of Gettysburg
programme.desc: An elite band of Yankee Sharpshooters must stop Robert E. Lee's Alabamian shock troops from flanking the Union line and winning the battle of Gettysburg and perhaps the entire Civil War.

programme.title: The Civil War: Brothers Divided: Battle of Nashville
programme.desc: In a daring attempt to regain the upper hand in the Civil War, Confederate forces try to retake the city of Nashville and sever the supply line that's feeding the Union invasion of the south.

programme.title: The Civil War: Brothers Divided: Battle of Petersburg
programme.desc: The Union invasion of the south has ground to a halt at the seemingly impregnable ring of trenches built around Petersburg, Virginia. After eight bloody attempts to storm them have failed, two officers from Vermont will lead a daring raid.

programme.title: The Civil War: Brothers Divided: Battle of Bull Run
programme.desc: In what will be the first real battle of the Civil War, untested and poorly trained Rebel and Confederate troops clash on the blood soaked banks of the Bull Run River.

programme.title: The Civil War: Brothers Divided: Battle of Antietam
programme.desc: Following a string of victories in Virginia, Confederate military genius General Robert E. Lee brings his army north in a bold attempt to end the Civil War and win Southern Independence.

programme.title: The Civil War: Brothers Divided: Battle of Fredericksburg
programme.desc: Following the strategic Union win at Antietam, federal forces clash with a massive Rebel army in the town of Fredericksburg, Virginia in what will become the largest fight of the Civil War.

programme.title: Blood Feuds: Gangs of New York
programme.desc: This notorious feud is one of the largest street wars in history. William Poole ('Bill the Butcher') rules New York's viciously anti-immigrant nativist gang, but the Bowery Boys challenge their hold.

programme.title: Blood Feuds: Hatfields and McCoys
programme.desc: The Hatfields (Devil Anse) versus the McCoys (Randall) is one of the most notorious feuds in American history. What starts as Civil War hostility rapidly escalates to kidnapping, illicit love affairs, murder, and a nation-wide turf war.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Top Secret World War II
programme.desc: We've all heard about the ultra covert units used in WWII, the unbreakable codes, top secret underground nerve centers, and super-human navy seals, but here is what history forgot about WWII's most classified operations.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Rebels With a Cause
programme.desc: Rosa parks was not the first African American women to refuse to give up her seat. The Berlin Airlift included candy for kids. One of the great rifles used in war was invented by a man who made moonshine.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Dilapidated Island Cabin
programme.desc: Chase and his team tackle a 1930s dilapidated island cabin with major rot issues. They have a budget of $30,000 and six weeks to complete the project.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: 130-Year-Old Island Cabin
programme.desc: Chase and his team tackle the renovation of a 130-year-old cabin located on an island with a budget of $40,000 and a time frame of six weeks.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Heirloom Home on the Shore
programme.desc: After 40 years of use, third-generation owners have decided to add facilities and living quarters to a family camp for large annual family reunions.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Family's Empty Nest
programme.desc: A family has the resources to give their Lincolnville, Maine, cabin the love it deserves now that their four children are almost done with college. However the cabin has been neglected for 25 years and corners were cut in the original build.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Oyster Farm Shack
programme.desc: Ashley Morrill and her team of builders find themselves rebuilding an old oyster shack for a working oyster farm in Edgecomb, Maine.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: The Hiltz Camp
programme.desc: Chase and his team are in the woods of New Sharon, Maine, to help Rod save his rundown camp from falling into the pristine Kimball Pond. He'd like to patch up the holes and get his wife to come back to the camp, which means a lot of hard work.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Cabin Overhaul
programme.desc: It's a Cabin Masters conundrum as Chase and the team are challenged to take a former garage and turn it into a home that will comfortably accommodate six siblings and their seventeen kids.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: A Family Gathering Place
programme.desc: Chase and his team take on a project on McGrath Pond in Oakland, ME, that has been empty for 15 years. Stephanie bought this place from her father and promised him she would fix it up.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Building Alaska: A New World of Challenges
programme.desc: Three news teams begin their projects and rookie builders Matt and Amy Hill quickly realize building in snow is more complicated than they planned. Mike and Dan Owens mill their own lumber while Jackie hires professionals to dig her foundation.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Snowball Effect
programme.desc: At Jackie's slippery build site, the team works to finish the subfloor and start raising walls, but rain and mud hinder them at every step. Meanwhile, the Hills are forced to dig their supplies out of three feet of snow.

programme.title: Building Alaska: This Is the Sketchy Part
programme.desc: The Hills work on their first floor framing, but work slows to a stop when their tools begin to freeze. The Owens work on installing the second story gables, while Jackie and her team work to finish the cabin's roof structure.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Have Saw, Will Cut
programme.desc: Jackie's team delivers French Doors only to find the frame fits incorrectly during installation. A snow machine delivery runs into problems on the melted trail at the Hill's build site.

programme.title: Building Alaska: The Most Amazing View
programme.desc: The teams continue to struggle as their build seasons come to a close. Jackie's team hurries to finish the interior of her cabin, while the Owens team is at risk of not finishing their client's cabin on time.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Building a Log Chapel With a Stained Glass Window
programme.desc: Mark and the guys head to Johnny Jett's hometown in Kentucky to build a log chapel. First, they reclaim a stained glass window from a deteriorating 100-year-old church. Then they build the chapel and install the window.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: A Barnwood Miracle
programme.desc: The Mt. Olivet Church has been the heart of Pocahontas County, WV for 137 years. The old log structure is struggling to survive, so Mark and the guys are called in to take it down and restore it. As the job ends, the community pulls off a surprise ending.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Repurposing Every Beam From a Pennsylvania Bank Barn
programme.desc: The guys take down a Pennsylvania Bank Barn in hopes of recovering the Long Beams and Huge Sleeper Logs that lay below. They are up against the weather, the machines malfunctioning and the weight of the logs.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Hillbilly Lemonade
programme.desc: The guys must get creative to make something worthwhile from a lackluster cabin. Later, Mark visits an incredible finished cabin made from logs he salvaged on the first season of the show.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Louisville, Ky
programme.desc: Casey Webb travels to Louisville, Kentucky, for some epic eats, including a booze-infused Southern staple and a one-of-a-kind spicy popcorn and frozen hot chocolate challenge in nearby Santa Claus, Indiana.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Portland, OR
programme.desc: Casey heads to Portland, Oregon, to taste mouth-watering Peruvian chicken, a succulent porchetta sandwich and a two-pound burrito packed with ten of the spiciest peppers in the world.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Hall of Fame: Decadent Desserts
programme.desc: Casey's sojourn of sustenance has had no shortage of sweets, and now it's time to celebrate the best of the best. We're counting down the most decadent desserts in Man vs. Food history and inducting them into our Hall of Fame.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Hall of Fame: Grill Masters
programme.desc: Armed with a serious love of food and years of experience in the restaurant business, Casey Webb travels the country in search of America's most delicious dishes and ultimate eating challenges.

programme.title: Good Eats: Squid Pro Quo II
programme.desc: Chef and Scientist Alton Brown demystifies calamari, and explores why so many chefs fail at cooking it.

programme.title: Good Eats: Pop Culture
programme.desc: Chef/ Scientist Alton Brown investigates modern movie popcorn.

programme.title: Good Eats: Bowl O' Bayou
programme.desc: Chef/ Scientist Alton Brown sheds light on Cajun and Creole, and comes up with a method for making a brick roux and the perfect gumbo.

programme.title: Good Eats: Pretzel Logic
programme.desc: Alton Brown recreates the traditional soft pretzel in all its crisp, chewy, golden brown glory.

programme.title: Good Eats: Reloaded: The Cookie Clause: The Reload
programme.desc: Alton Brown reloads this classic holiday episode with the help of a jolly old elf in red who's demanding that his Christmas cookies be gluten-free. The resulting cookies are even better than the originals.

programme.title: Good Eats: School of Hard Nogs
programme.desc: Alton takes a serious look at the holiday cocktail.

programme.title: The Zimmern List: Queens
programme.desc: Andrew takes us around the world as he eats his way through Queens, NY. He digs into a monster Mexican sandwich, samples some of New York's best Egyptian cuisine and feasts on Argentine meats and authentic Taiwanese fare.

programme.title: The Zimmern List: Cleveland
programme.desc: Andrew visits Cleveland for a taste of the city's culinary comeback. He gets nostalgic at the West Side Market, discovers new classics in a 100-year-old food hall and swings by a neighborhood butcher shop that's earning rave reviews.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Harlem
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern explores Harlem, a vibrant New York City neighborhood with a diverse cross-section of cultures. He highlights its colorful restaurants offering soul food, Caribbean classics, and even the national dish of Senegal.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Scottish Highlands
programme.desc: Andrew explores the bountiful larder and proud history that provides chefs in the Scottish Highlands with the building blocks for uniquely Highland dishes. He enjoys lean, flavourful Highland beef, buttery shellfish, and handheld meat pies.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Tahiti
programme.desc: From a Polynesian twist on ceviche to freshwater shrimp coated in a sweet, coconut-curry sauce, Andrew sets sail on a culinary voyage through the signature dishes of Tahiti.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Nova Scotia
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern explores iconic dishes of picturesque Nova Scotia, Canada, which became a fishing hub after being settled by Europeans in the 16th century. The proximity to the sea -- it's never more than 42 miles away!
