programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Bingo's and Rolly's Birthday / Electric Pugaloo
programme.desc: It's the pups' birthday! Bob learns to dance.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Mickey's Handy Helpers
programme.desc: When the Handy Helpers go limp, Mickey discovers the Clubhouse machine is broken.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Goofy's Super Wish
programme.desc: Goofy wishes he could be a super-hero so that he can help out his friends.

programme.title: Bluey: Squash / Charades / Bingo
programme.desc: The adventures of Bluey, a loveable puppy who lives with her parents and little sister.

programme.title: Bluey: Teasing/ Shaun/ Daddy Robot
programme.desc: Bluey teases Bingo; Bluey and Bingo ask Dad to get a pet; Dad puts Bluey and Bingo to bed.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Camp Happy Helpers
programme.desc: Mickey and the gang participate in high-spirited races around the globe.

programme.title: Disney Junior Ready for Preschool: We Get Dressed
programme.desc: Nancy teaches JoJo how to get dressed so the two of them can put on a fun fashion show.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Pluto Lends a Paw
programme.desc: When Minnie's kitty, Figaro, wanders off because he feels ignored, Pluto the Rescue Dog saves the day by finding the missing pet.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Goofy's Coconutty Monkey
programme.desc: Coco the Monkey is planning to have a Coconutty Milk Party for everyone.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Goofy's Bird
programme.desc: Goofy finds a lost bird and Mickey helps him bring it back home to his mom in the forest.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Choo-Choo Express
programme.desc: Mickey and his pals assemble a choo-choo train to help Professor Von Drake bring non-melting snow to the clubhouse.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Mickey Saves Santa
programme.desc: Mickey and company save Christmas!

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Donald Hatches an Egg
programme.desc: The clubhouse pals discover a mystery egg among Goofy's rock collection; they try to find out what kind of animal is inside in order to return it to its mother. In the meantime, Donald Duck serves as a reluctant babysitter when the little egg develops.

programme.title: Chuggington: Out In The Cold / The Old Fashioned Way
programme.desc: Young rookie trains learn how to help themselves and the people of their town.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Prince Pete's Catnap
programme.desc: The Clubhouse pals discover what has been keeping Prince Pete awake, after trying hard to help him fall asleep for a nap. It was a stack of peas under the cushion of his favourite car.

programme.title: Gigantosaurus: The Shortest Day / Mazu's Comet
programme.desc: Tiny throws a party but can she deliver on the outrageous promises she made? When Mazu wants to see a once-in-a-lifetime comet, everyone else's needs threaten to get in the way.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Super-Charged: The Big Cheesy / Shenannygans!
programme.desc: During the Cooper's Hill Cheese Rolling Chase, a cheese wheel spins out of control! The Happy Helpers work as nannies for two children in London and take them on new experiences!

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Mixed-Up Adventures: Mixed-Up for a Day!/ Princess Clarabelle!
programme.desc: A special winner gets mixed-up for the day! When Clarabelle ends up with the hidden royal scepter, everyone in Royalandia thinks she's the new princess!

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Elves for a Day/ The Dreidel Dilemma
programme.desc: The Pugs and pals head to the North Pole to help Santa's elves meet the Christmas deadline! When Chloe's special special dreidel gets left at home, Keia asks the Pugs for help!

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Design-a-dog/ Ice, Ice Puggy
programme.desc: Bingo and Rolly accidentally chew Bob's childhood toy. Then, when Bobo's icemaker breaks, the pugs go to Antarctica to get him ice.

programme.title: Toy Story That Time Forgot
programme.desc: During a post-Christmas play date, the gang finds themselves in uncharted territory when the coolest set of action figures ever turn out to be dangerously delusional. It's all up to Trixie the triceratops if the gang hopes to return to Bonnie's room.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Santa Baby/ Shear Madness
programme.desc: Pip and Freddy teach a magical baby reindeer the joy of Christmas giving! When Pip and Freddy accidentally shave a baby sheep's wool, they have to fix it before she is delivered.

programme.title: Bluey: Verandah Santa/ Christmas Swim/ Sleepytime
programme.desc: Bluey gets a new teddy for Christmas and introduces him to the whole family, but the family plays too rough with him and now he wants to go home.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Happy Holiday Helpers!
programme.desc: Minnie, Daisy and Cuckoo Loca set up their office Christmas party.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Anchors Away/ Prospector Pups
programme.desc: Bob rents a floating house on the Mississippi River with Bingo and Rolly. Bob and the Pugs go on a Wild West-themed vacation.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: The Lab Four / Feelin' Antsy
programme.desc: When a performance by Bob's favourite band, The Walruses, is canceled, Bingo and Rolly make it their mission to ensure the show goes on. Then, when ants invade playcare, the pugs must find a way to get them out.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Art for Pug's Sake/ Winter Wonder-Pug
programme.desc: The pugs try to hang something of Bob's in a famous Italian art museum. Bingo and Rolly look for the first snowflake of the season while helping other animals prepare for winter.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: A Christmas Mission in Toyland/ Nine Lights Tonight
programme.desc: Auggie and Mo help recite their naptime Christmas story when the pages of their book go missing. Then, Bingo and Rolly go on a mission to help Santa and Mrs. Claus replace the lights on their friend's Hanukkiah.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Back to Cool/ Baby Breakdown
programme.desc: Pip and Freddy deliver a baby Penguin to Pip's hometown. When Pip and Freddy break the conveyor belt at T.O.T.S. they are determined to fix it on their own.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Mission to the Moon / Say Cheese
programme.desc: A baby wolf longs to see the moon, so Pip and Freddy embark on a mission to make her dream come true. During photo day, JP entrusts a photo-ready Lucky to Pip and Freddy’s care.

programme.title: Doc McStuffins: Arcade Escapade/ Starry, Starry Night
programme.desc: While on a trip with her dad and Donny to the arcade, Doc discovers a stuffed giraffe with a ripped seam in the claw crane game. Doc diagnoses Aurora, a toy telescope, with Blurrystaritis, realizing that the cause of the blurriness is a missing eyepiece.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: A Santa for Bob / Snowman Secret Service
programme.desc: When Bob asks Bingo and Rolly to protect a snowman he’s building, the pugs make it their mission to keep their new snowy friend as cool as possible.

programme.title: Movie: A Fairly Odd Christmas
programme.desc: Timmy Turner is trying to grant kids' wishes, but he ends up causing kids' names to disappear off of Santa's good list. Timmy has to work with his childhood friend Tootie to make sure Christmas isn't ruined.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Birthday Bashed/ Momnipresent
programme.desc: Timmy refuses to celebrate his birthday; it's SepTIMberfest, a big Hollywood event.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Clark Laser/ Married to the Mom
programme.desc: When Timmy and Chloe save Dark Laser's beloved pet, Flipsie, Dark Laser becomes bound to them as their bodyguard. Timmy and Chloe wish up a girlfriend for Mr. Crocker to get him off their backs.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Fairly Oddlympics
programme.desc: Timmy and friends compete in an Olympics of their own to see who is most magical.

programme.title: Ollie's Pack: Getting Oldie With It/ Lil' Baby Ollie
programme.desc: After Ollie, Cleo and Bernie use an age-up monster to get into the movies, Bernie experiences the joys of being old. Later, Ollie impresses the coolest kids in school but now he's got to watch a scary movie featuring his biggest fear, geese.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Mission Responsible/ Hair-I-Cane
programme.desc: Cosmo and Wanda are exhausted, so Timmy volunteers to baby-sit and give them a night out. Timmy's tired of getting really bad haircuts from Dad.

programme.title: Movie: Charlotte's Web
programme.desc: After a farmer's daughter convinces him to let a piglet live, the pig turns to a wise spider to keep him alive.

programme.title: Movie: Albert: The Little Tree With Big Dreams
programme.desc: Albert, a little Douglas Fir tree who loves Christmas more than anyone, goes on a road trip from his little nursery to the big city to make his dreams come true.

programme.title: The Loud House: 11 Louds a Leapin'
programme.desc: The Louds are getting ready for Christmas, when the unthinkable happens to Lincoln; his sled goes in the neighbour's yard. Lincoln and Clyde attempt to pull off a sled-rescue-mission and end up finding secrets about Mr. Grouse.

programme.title: The Loud House: Snow Way Out/ Snow Way Down
programme.desc: Despite the heavy snowfall, Lana convinces the kids to go to the Burpin' Burger to meet her racecar driving hero. Lincoln goes on vacation with Clyde and realizes just how overprotective Clyde's dads are.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: Christmas
programme.desc: A multi-generational Mexican-American family run a market in a big city.

programme.title: The Loud House: Roughin' It/ The Waiting Game
programme.desc: Lincoln is worried that he's lost his manliness from growing up with all sisters, so he and Clyde go camping. Lincoln gets Lori a job at a pizza arcade, but when he starts to ask favors of her, Lori gets in hot water.

programme.title: The Loud House: Sound of Silence/ Space Invader
programme.desc: Lincoln buys a pair sound-cancelling ear buds to drown out the sound of his sisters. After Lynn and Lucy get in a fight, Lincoln agrees to let Lynn bunk in his room but only for a night.
